subject: why is amnesty back on the table?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
| | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=533378d3a2&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling. And, once again, **Congress is ignoring the human suffering on the border to spend its time on a**** _disastrous_****amnesty proposal that only adds fuel to the fire!**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=41c7b9f49b&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Under the smoke screen of “bipartisanship,” Sens. Tillis and Sinema have agreed to a so-called “immigration reform” framework that would grant amnesty to **TWO MILLION** illegal aliens.**** Here at Heritage Action, we’re leading the fight in Washington to **_ensure_****this amnesty deal is derailed,** but it means nothing without thousands of conservative activists backing our fight. Your donation will be used for grassroots education and letter campaigns to members of Congress encouraging them to oppose this terrible amnesty deal. **[_Fellow Conservative, tell Congress NO AMNESTY by making a grassroots contribution now >>_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=311f9f1b9c&e=fdefed58de)**
---
| | [**SAY NO TO AMNESTY >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=714b54743b&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Granting amnesty would be a virtual free pass to millions who have not been fully processed. Even worse, it would only encourage _millions more_ to rush to the border and join other so-called asylum seekers. **Fellow Conservative, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help us prevent this disastrous framework from becoming a reality.** [**_Can we count on your IMMEDIATE support? >>_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dded3e826e&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**SAY NO TO AMNESTY: $250 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0643e511f5&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**SAY NO TO AMNESTY: $100 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7c5dc6695b&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**SAY NO TO AMNESTY: $75 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8de6b5186c&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**SAY NO TO AMNESTY: $50 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=37c8346960&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**SAY NO TO AMNESTY: ANY AMOUNT >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1749d186e0&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Thank you,

Jessica Anderson Executive Director Heritage Action for America

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X752w_v-H9zoTJY_ZNTcqZybWeOf3eg0nKTuDQ_FbqZAHhRwSEPg2WLmixj8fG4Bk0BNdPGXhZr3taBjy7XVtkYS5F6eoYtsDFSzOwguvXfUZyvsI36j2u0DhAHY9SD9FfJF4dnlX9yl8z4SuImfwWQq21gWriXBHCPFaoY6jteoVdQ1ArqSCmW2Lmj2br_6xPrWsXIw5FHUi4D44A1P9M)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I 'm officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X752w_v-H9zoTJY_ZNTcqZybWeOf3eg0nKTuDQ_FbqZAHhRwSEPg2WLmixj8fG4BnghNm7Tc0Ndu7jZe9NJTAIsGjgzOvMxiycNeE50TL9MFUgm4u82REX3CiD9HwTjcfhy8C61DrfUm5JpBgtEsPXy-6jbldIvxCHrJlBOiahTaKVnf2Z9ukko86n3471QAMVFo-awc0tNBYz0icCVBcH)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X752w_v-H9zoTJY_ZNTcqZybWeOf3eg0nKTuDQ_FbqZAHhRwSEPg2WLmixj8fG4BkYHLdKE2h_ZczQLYoYrbxVtvsn5nVkK5DpwdIwoWW56C76YeTolYueYz602yfZn3P3TEAgPBVeh5ewG2HQdVVfssI243tzawtNYp5P3foZEW46Pasw3SL38rRbh3AAxjV5PP4rG_k80zhB77b1EAMB)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X752w_v-H9zoTJY_ZNTcqZybWeOf3eg0nKTuDQ_FbqZAHhRwSEPg2WLmixj8fG4BmSacRtWBZV68NJShHdqwaik8qZXJB1nUVLsVZOYBAaoI54olgWDzMGt5_joPTHxHhRZBNmtrSIZzEmjYGOWA47_Qw9EY7pzobS3e-hEWJhTTA0Z6Mw_-wkl8NOmF4fGXYJIgzaKv20eypaClNLuvnD)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he'll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X752w_v-H9zoTJY_ZNTcqZybWeOf3eg0nKTuDQ_FbqZAHhRwSEPg2WLmixj8fG4Bm5HvvQpWxGWGa0lyCPDaVX_i0Uh7tQDLIkULmmxnzKea4fF-ZXh5AFAb8c6QdGpL8B4axqsVm34YHrAsL4ZLoug8DJLaf5wY5B4KXlazMohXKRjDFC5kJoi0G0WoPcieuBXkYWUmLpn6jnmMAbUyfu)**

**[Just $30--or anything you can afford--will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X752w_v-H9zoTJY_ZNTcqZybWeOf3eg0nKTuDQ_FbqZAHhRwSEPg2WLmixj8fG4BmGGq0IB_6BiY9M9fBVHyO-gWO9Jv634Lk10oDOtEm8ewhPktFtw4JTqsmOhYqMRrUsy83XWZxzVaOaDgA9ghg4-X9BUB6pabVPkSVf4ylwbNSzOF4XHWnvMzJBhCnvZ9T8BCnwkngJRuDd7rAxFMMU)**
| | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X752w_v-H9zoTJY_ZNTcqZybWeOf3eg0nKTuDQ_FbqZAHhRwSEPg2WLmixj8fG4BmVvxJ3colTQ1QYtmJo4nKEW1tfyE53A0ma_JgmcZTySKR4G-YCy5h0unm1b8iJy86xPUlp2kGIYdR7kUqcGAVoV38nGbqb2_lZFijGBD7roa05Ua4X9qin15X8fRB0f6n17NVl9pDWaxu574UfLK-U)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $55](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0X88SjT-ofwFKiG0B_tydDkxMrCaIOWfxcmwFCjUbSgZVQUuc1ikkw8w_-0UBti0BSDB_4726IQ7uTjdxysmlYa3m3FJiDJkXjKNzTXPH8lCETCXuG_Rod9g11LXj6v9qkCH5CvtOsjXJT0Fq-qcGHt-p9D8Ja9ibpSrj67Hn9GARmEr4J6V_HsSO-yLNkHmK4QKOsFTSYQTVT8EKhI1NF0)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $80](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a45e7f9219e491f95a636e9df97f346&_e=HZEzbUGLdu17UlccL4K_y-PPFUOEjoIH3B8WQ5CyHNTGfCvhd0SqWoCZOdk0I1ogVWDtA3zbcJdn1Rjn3G6RevUN00p5-RWxj2ewHgx7p0UUXlGN2lTqWmJgeUSgtffp5NHBN2u8BH2wHUEna6khEuu8HVTPvocsh5b064ewbbYHn2ehKaw46njC4AFV8Aszrj_yP2CYXUP7LRcsXN3FXC0drecj7YlcrmEasqk-hX9LPPZyUzLeO7ih0OY6uIpD_AAI7rr--yCH1_UGAcXXICGrdSNJNrWQepVy9rk7LFlIfKadB3IqGpXJliobk10z)

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: Official GOP Audit
subject: Have we lost your support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
You haven’t responded in a while.

---
This is getting **SAD** , Fellow American.

Patriots across the country have STEPPED UP and completed the [**December Republican Platform Audit,**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8012e4fb714486db6845966f0062e06&_e=bPcucTAyszpzyPtUhz9eK37pd8mXsv5WKEgJa7Tt3VCFBtmHlW44eQsaAAj5cVMO-eRfYx7kRRITIZVqtPcoxQXxgjFLI8JAx6kp8YAQGvje9A4NeOWhH2Wnti3taf2KI_uply2hZO7uH4J8zAlfKz4FqTI9Savlf2XtLQxojJA-I32uO0sRFQWvMQit_p7oQf90hvnMPO9whepDYGi-bCQripXCLxGT14aYbMv3nDuao8pVfTqzRnymDYaGHzY5TohI3v3ntaYrUHcF8gfI0tjFgNFgBMzCsATnwfbepSANZX5JMMPWgTdO91we_4x8275Tcb8Kk6ttU2VK8fI2lEcAq4C1O_rHYjjURf9w5LuLLWX06KStIC9acftPkRFFOnv64MbVRS-TqukFzV-0P-rEe74_20EJS0El8fX9x4Hl7pDZDvN5rDYFmI9ryYnHDqc8J11inEKjKqdrY724PQ%3D%3D) but NOT YOU. _We’re beginning to question your loyalty to the GOP..._

## [TAKE AUDIT >>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8012e4fb714486db6845966f0062e06&_e=bPcucTAyszpzyPtUhz9eK37pd8mXsv5WKEgJa7Tt3VCFBtmHlW44eQsaAAj5cVMO-eRfYx7kRRITIZVqtPcoxQXxgjFLI8JAx6kp8YAQGvje9A4NeOWhH2Wnti3taf2KI_uply2hZO7uH4J8zAlfKz4FqTI9Savlf2XtLQxojJA-I32uO0sRFQWvMQit_p7oQf90hvnMPO9whepDYGi-bCQripXCLxGT14aYbMv3nDuao8pVfTqzRnymDYaGHzY5TohI3v3ntaYrUHcF8gfI0tjFgNFgBMzCsATnwfbepSANZX5JMMPWgTdO91we_4x8MlMeppNS34-JvpzwZDNLUW74Yw01-hLUg1mS7dOl0eH6ICy4QuSL09HORP2ImwVncRO4eGGDqNZl2zTW4mYOvfvcWvmfRshPwZaoV4PabMEY-U2bt4HvqObRyXVQs-gVW4tNhOJ_wFCAToxroqU5HQ%3D%3D) We even asked a few other Patriots in **_YOUR AREA_** , and they responded, but YOU DID NOT.

This message will serve as your FINAL reminder, Fellow American. You won’t get another chance to prove your dedication to the Republican Party.

[**Please complete the December Republican Platform Audit and contribute $25 in the NEXT HOUR to help shape our Party’s WINNING strategy. >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8012e4fb714486db6845966f0062e06&_e=bPcucTAyszpzyPtUhz9eK37pd8mXsv5WKEgJa7Tt3VCFBtmHlW44eQsaAAj5cVMO-eRfYx7kRRITIZVqtPcoxQXxgjFLI8JAx6kp8YAQGvje9A4NeOWhH2Wnti3taf2KI_uply2hZO7uH4J8zAlfKz4FqTI9Savlf2XtLQxojJA-I32uO0sRFQWvMQit_p7oQf90hvnMPO9whepDYGi-bCQripXCLxGT14aYbMv3nDuao8pVfTqzRnymDYaGHzY5TohI3v3ntaYrUHcF8gfI0tjFgNFgBMzCsATnwfbepSANZX5JMMPWgTdO91we_4x8q_ZXjj4mynLJFb9-FpMpZ-c3AhNbYLoGXH-J7lYIXWtrAbpMi-iPUnH9DxvARvgJQ6I9LMPOo2y_lsYoeSxw4QFWoO15kSXW1tIRM6BtUOg1SpZEHw4fXvB34_o3t79bpfI6ehWr-JkUjZoYrvX0Jg%3D%3D)

**DECEMBER REPUBLICAN PLATFORM AUDIT**
**DID YOU VOTE REPUBLICAN IN THE 2022 MIDTERM ELECTIONS?**

Our 4th quarter report is likely to be the _**LAST public report**_ before I make an announcement about what I’m running for next cycle.

You’ve seen the articles written about a potential US Senate or gubernatorial run — so many eyes will be looking at this report!

I’d ask if you would consider, one last time, stepping up and contributing so we can **retain our position** as the _**strongest**_**statewide Republican in the 2024 field.**

clean_body: | | | | We're closing up for the holidays, but still need to end strong. You in? Dear Peter, I’m writing to you today because I need your help. Our 4th quarter report is likely to be the LAST public report before I make an announcement about what I’m running for next cycle. You’ve seen the articles written about a potential US Senate or gubernatorial run — so many eyes will be looking at this report! I’d ask if you would consider, one last time, stepping up and contributing so we can retain our position as the strongeststatewide Republican in the 2024 field. | Contributing now will also allow us to continue our unparalleled work of defeating the Biden Administration in court. I have more than two years left in my current term as Attorney General and don’t plan on letting Biden off the hook! Can I count on you one last time this year? | Thank you. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 \- =

name: Katie Porter
subject: Teaching/learning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15570%2E3422442%2ER1ZRyK)
**Being a Member of Congress is about teaching and learning.**
As a former law professor, I always say my current job has some real similarities to my last one.
**My job is to _learn_ from my constituents about what problems they’re facing.** I also learn from witnesses during congressional hearings. Sometimes the information I learn is really valuable, and other times we learn that they have no business being in a position of power. I’m also always learning from policy experts as we consider the best way to tackle big problems.
**It’s also my job to _teach_ people about what’s going on in Congress and how it relates to them.** I know that most people don’t watch the news all day and only tune in if they have a few extra minutes—and that’s why I try to get my message across quickly and effectively. I aim to show people how policy made in Washington determines all sorts of things—from access to abortion to what your prescription will cost.
That brings us to the whiteboard. As a teacher, I’ve spent years using a whiteboard to break things down, so it was only natural that I brought my whiteboard to Congress. It’s an effective tool. And it’s fun!
I’m proud to be fighting for families in Congress, but I wouldn’t be here without your support.
Onward,
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE20_TEA_20221220_V1_F&t=2&akid=15570%2E3422442%2ER1ZRyK)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15570%2E3422442%2ER1ZRyK)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15570%2E3422442%2ER1ZRyK).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: House Select Committee Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Will you read the January 6th Committee’s final report?
body:
The House Select Committee is set to release their final report of the January 6th investigation on December 21st. | | |
---
| | **UPDATE: The House Select Committee is set to release their final report of the January 6th investigation to the public TOMORROW.** The House Select Committee has been working tirelessly for nearly two years on this investigation – some of which directly implicates Republican state legislators across the country – and we believe that the public should be given the opportunity to see the _full_ truth behind Jan. 6th. The House Select Committee has been working tirelessly for nearly two years on this investigation – some of which directly implicates Republican state legislators across the country – and we believe that the public should be given the opportunity to see the full truth behind Jan. 6th. | Are you going to read the January 6th Committee’s final report? Yes No Unsure We’ve already seen some of the committee’s findings during televised hearings, but there could be much more in the written report. Remember: This investigation not only looked into Trump, but state election officials and legislators in states like Arizona and Georgia – so it could reveal critical information that could help us fight insurrectionists and election deniers on the state level. Consider this your official invitation to enter to win VIP TICKETS to my EPIC RALLY. If you win, We’ll cover your flights. We’ll cover your hotel. You’ll get VIP tickets to the rally. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Save America JFC by clicking . Entries must be received between December 8, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on January 31, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. name: NRA HQ
subject: Official 2022 NRA Approval Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Answer poll now >> | In 2022, the NRA has fought tirelessly to protect your Second Amendment rights...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)

Peter,

**In 2022, the NRA has fought tirelessly to protect your Second Amendment rights.**

In June, _the NRA won the Supreme Court case NYSRPA v. Bruen_ , the most significant Second Amendment ruling in more than a decade, which affirmed that the right to bear arms does _**not stop at a person's front door.**_

This year, _Georgia became the 25th state to legally recognize NRA-Backed Constitutional Carry_ , eliminating the need for government permission for law-abiding citizens to exercise their right to bear arms.

_The NRA also helped elect a band of NRA-endorsed candidates_ committed to defending Americans' sacred Second Amendment rights in Congress. The NRA has and will continue to work on a local, state, and national level to STOP gun-grabbers from trampling Americans' rights.

Peter, now that the year is coming to a close, we want to know what YOU think. You have been selected to take the **Official 2022 NRA Approval Poll.**

_The NRA is committed to fighting for you, and we want to ensure YOU approve of our efforts to protect your gun rights._
**[TAKE THE POLL»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)**
The NRA will continue to stand between the American people and the radical anti-gun legislators threatening their Constitutional rights. We ask that you stand with us in 2023 and beyond, starting with answering this crucial approval poll.

**[Please answer the OFFICIAL 2022 NRA APPROVAL POLL now to help us secure our 2023 plan to protect your rights.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)**

**[OFFICIAL 2022 NRA APPROVAL POLL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)**
**Do you support the Second Amendment right to keep and bear arms?**

**[YES»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)**

**[NO»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)**

**[TAKE THE POLL»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)**

Thank you,

NRA HQ

**[TAKE THE POLL»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62103701:JEfhZGGoN:m:1:3331421248:A59BF33975DD378C518E30D295E0834A:r)**

body:

---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqsribukbi6juv6lfdft6rlvv5f2fgvll62a4qgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)****[”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8iael2r8uetanir6hblgf3ukuadt66g7vu018h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za9vrh9nbqc6e8kar5pvo5tsa1d7528i83260h78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4t0ea3126j5cec4ofjjs0m51cf5n87oa2auh34o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0t9qju3v8vcfr2djs30kfcq71prglu16ombjf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I’d hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I’m giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98627%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9cGemyXSZAKcHCQY96SFlw&sysid=1)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98628%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1IxpijwslwpxG8UPQTJxdw&sysid=1) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98629%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QugWK9CGZtjvE%2bCAEZ%2f7zw&sysid=1) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98620%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ba54OysDzBBAI9D%2fETzwHw&sysid=1)**
It’s critical I get your response before then because I’m meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I’ll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqj9qadrmjs5387084d8mqnaosqkt8jh0jjjl870_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za6icgbmnrlktkeksnmdgro5q8jhtl2pc3skvrog_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)****[”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6cvipl5t2ckbjout18dgp2rlri3pckbcb1d94h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3cbgtca1npmpr99mnre1a72nsa88ciq1al5elsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zumbln1p8cj5t79lcnv1lhe5n5vftjclkh72vum8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr3vosnh2fttorcaf5j741vppdvhhfhlvugb69d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4clh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2aamjpmljv1tltsd1csqhddo323a127kqvaom4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ubnehr2gjgrtp81c6s2gt740hru9cuqabok1u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm5qu1pqkunnqnri7nfq762ueb1en4hbuqjh5pv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2tpi3l962vfc45kho3lvtosmle8rc80p6augqhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1sagoqpob7avn389ucv857jk76mrinr6mvf5fuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjk39hsshm2ib05egu0dkn4og26fkimalveqr21g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)**
| | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4kdrn5ofb38qlqso193kos4bp00cv5ggqsikug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $55](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2s311q97q4h4inq2d0l7krojgr98gadqj29irr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh60ob4c5h2bs)
---

---
Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsqnf5hk8qjmoulikjp3i05b9q9cua7ie1ivmkgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh64oj6c1h2bs)****[”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9bianvj9550003ha6vlj22v7c3bgab6ncc6d2m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh64oj6c1h2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgk0s1n211qddp9s9l7gv7c28dngtv29oe7j9qmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh64oj6c1h2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

| |

* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset

* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zblcu1kv1t6pjigv8agbi23lamn80b82fila7o3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh62o30clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi804vvbvkgr628lkaqio1fs93tspqaihdmkcsr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh62o30clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgpr239ke15jpvvml4e7u3ehv7sij4ai95c9kap8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh62o30clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhu5v60gcad32vmn0g951mdps2kqn012oo9n8oe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh62o30clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zhrf9mosev6v26f0i0vgu02ftjrb4fc6tr9h9npo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Did Greg Abbott actually declare an invasion?
body:
Let's Tacobout It...

**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**

Twice this year, Greg Abbott has supposedly declared an invasion... but
did he really? And does each state actually have the authority to
protect its own borders?

I'm joined by guests Manny Rodriguez and Frank Lopez, two U.S. Army
Veterans, and retired Border Patrol Agents.

Let's Taco 'bout it!

Full episode will be available on Thursday at 7pm exclusively on Locals:
https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqYW1lc29uZWxsaXMubG9jYWxzLmNvbQ==&sig=HjhSxwS9H1wLskdyVwmbzoNt2uGTZ9oJkVXNQzgeqd4F&iat=1671631344&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=122A144A1A1013 <https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqYW1lc29uZWxsaXMubG9jYWxzLmNvbQ==&sig=HjhSxwS9H1wLskdyVwmbzoNt2uGTZ9oJkVXNQzgeqd4F&iat=1671631344&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=122A144A1A1013>

name: American Update
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0228%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SW%2fA7AKTZG5Tl0zu94YJZQ&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43345%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s2sxhM4kFLSM6JGGGd0Krw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A68agj2x3uI5f5oW%2bRABcw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43347%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fJ2SYHwf657kiMvAwAA3yA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43348%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=exy3J663zCSRY5ES9jp7ww&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0228%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SW%2fA7AKTZG5Tl0zu94YJZQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0228%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SW%2fA7AKTZG5Tl0zu94YJZQ&sysid=1)

body:
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.

Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhdcrcc1pdjfj8739v4p57q6sou4cdcc9uen3df0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh6eor0c3h2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

Hey Friend,

******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi4t4mdb9pqhgrshjecndms2eohrhdopt4jn3kcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdh6eor0c3h2bs)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: This Will Cause Some CONTROVERSY | My Op-Ed Was Just Published...
body:
This Will Cause Some Controversy... Today, the Gateway Pundit published my Op-Ed on why I refuse to abandon President Trump as a Christian leader eve
| | |
---
## This Will Cause Some Controversy...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9417.1.fd09604aa575820ef47332bb4aa620ec)
---
Today, the [Gateway Pundit](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9418.1.16811267d1e535895461f9cc6e1e5edf) published my Op-Ed on why I refuse to abandon **President Trump** as a Christian leader even though other Christian leaders are doing so.
In this Op-Ed, I make the case of _why_ Christians in America should support **Donald Trump** for the Presidency in 2024.
You can read the Op-Ed by visiting: [https://www.thegatewaypundit.com/2022/12/christian-leaders-abandoned-trump-refuse/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9419.1.c50558a9238cdc637c0806f9c3f11869)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9420.1.29541c04009488b052591e5becc295cc), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9421.1.05da2e9a55521e26dc74f29cefd3876e), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9422.1.9db7967112dfb3d8047eba57517bad88), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9423.1.f540c866515da8a708834e48bc26f9b7), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9424.1.dcaf29084d77ea05368061a6ced397f7) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9425.1.b7c0c26780eb229ab7b59173b229dfd6)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9426.1.00c898e1b7cd15097f7af6557502ec63)
| | [ Jackson Lahmeyer's Op-Ed ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9427.1.23a04291288fccf86a943849d8d8458c)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9428.1.66ce31a9d4f3e5752708476c5a09091b)
---
Last week, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9429.1.ee5478e350cb77eb020a4a4532e6ceda) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9430.1.2443f4465b2ee033bf70b3e032887958)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9431.1.6fdbf2122ea83318bb23bc5fe6393b7d) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9432.1.3e4146c83aab699410f17843d40855a2) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9433.1.9b79698a6a00708c4c3d0e84b879326a) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9434.1.2c1bffbcff7270dd08de9491826f8bd9) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9435.1.8de910d21f0bfd2a3f9657f0acbf28cf) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9436.1.722e2375777d27ec5ff61e648df8f74a) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---
## Don't Miss Out!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9437.1.1d86d4d16802b6f928651b445fc97c6f)
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse.
In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never
In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9438.1.36d0ec9eafed281f7adc345cd9b9ac4d).
I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9439.1.31df749d5d5fcb2c3efc7aaf957828d5) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple.
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9440.1.9b3fd6c10bba2a6f8ccd3925ac73ab30) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9441.1.25345360d1b8759566cd0649f01cab50) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9442.1.4942c93b7928059bdc08f7f36354bc82)
| | [ Sheridan Bible College ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9443.1.ec8e43c01c5a9581068dae764f339998)
---
---
## Mike Lindell Needs Our Help!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9444.1.f78efac0edaadb0f925b7a2a7446cc41)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9445.1.119fccdc4c8d2cc629fca98b5ccca26e), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9446.1.c09faab2a4df93a35832a5374f2941b5).

We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16289978.9448.1.5dbb7ccdc21e71e7ef7464a14910436f)

name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.

Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6nf2smblf41mbsm20gasij0q5l11p9pma456fag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj68oj4c9h2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5f1un28nvrjp65hif04g4q1nn8ncdl27fev3sd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj68oj4c9h2bs) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5l21qqf8qna6gckqqg6ahb1vstrk943i5302q60_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj68oj4c9h2bs) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhn9b37lo7tj4rf848f6nnt3bd8sov6bijdrt5k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj68oj4c9h2bs)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7517%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=pyDKe8XlSUigmPCkRCinfg&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77405%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=udmKTGfT3CSy8kRBVb%2b68w&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77406%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lqgk083H6%2faaGZiyEolGOw&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77407%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q6D84Le0ihiYaHEk7m439A&sysid=1)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77408%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oIfuNk3ilpXokXbww978%2fQ&sysid=1) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7517%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=pyDKe8XlSUigmPCkRCinfg&sysid=1)_

name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: Peter, I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Peter,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62104514:6pjYXGGNr:m:1:3331421248:0280E753C5F9E2236E1C781757C79778:r)
I look forward to hearing from you, Peter.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Peter,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62104515:6pjYXGGNr:m:1:3331421248:0280E753C5F9E2236E1C781757C79778:r) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62104515:6pjYXGGNr:m:1:3331421248:0280E753C5F9E2236E1C781757C79778:r) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
**[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62104515:6pjYXGGNr:m:1:3331421248:0280E753C5F9E2236E1C781757C79778:r)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: American Comeback
subject: All I want for Christmas is New Republican Leadership!
body:
The GOP has failed us for TOO LONG!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TuiZ0hFQW7Dy0lSJeIHYYFJBLYmoI0C-W7W9m-fCHOXXKDt3eurLOCkTfpfZsduZk9F9zbvCkwl_BNn8Pswp0BzkzgYxgqweZvYXroxE7tMZWtC1RiJ-PomAsViluYv1W7KG6RMmoq7IOlDoTdikZNP30VuFztWB_lniOiDC1w4ZByIpjyU4s3w3JuCpJ657yNLmG6XiNW-kkwyjtH-QILw-TPb3IJgq-bixkuK-5hMN0v6xQ0IdNJMhBeNddiRwzRDbxw4CSMug_gox5EPBH6hOlZLDXwfs7PPqOmsXmHlfSVC_QClik15x6TxpYGcs4N6YTeliwlS4YG5VSstFbP76lO0dukuUSAlUpc0PhQ0=&c=wZRfqqD5RGwB5VeWBKHNJacXYv-Ozemj1x5JeLV_9a7x0w8lEVb27Q==&ch=nvxeFr_cutslR28puGsyZgW5_PG9dkaMmLpDe1zXMnz6OYhHKu-sjg==)
---
| Peter \-
Republican leadership has failed our country time and time again.
The RNC has overseen embarrassing losses in every election since 2018 and now they plan to re-elect Ronna Romney as their Chairman.
In New Jersey, the NJGOP has also failed time and time again.
They failed to elect Jack Ciattarelli in 2021 and produced horrendous results during the midterms because of their sheer incompetence.

body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zibnul7fdgprjo5f9dbr3mfg8rd3b9cahaj65h10_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj62o72chh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc10rknpp5unqe7ug9uriv6viulvuj9ku1kp4ha8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj62o72chh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlomidiin50cbjpfkqtnrpon5a4g8hek9ub2qob8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj62o72chh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfj1jsc1h7s261bof01dfjuup9begai3jsn7p5ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj62o72chh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfhcjqsedl8mpspomo5k32andrsf45m2iaj8u328_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj62o72chh2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zivpo498rmbvvagnkva8iqkg1b5cgov5rshiiic8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdj62o72chh2bs)**

Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition to Senate Democrats: Use committee control to investigate corporate America
body:
Signature needed
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fad8302-64dc-4f42-939d-7bfd37e163b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, [**Sign the petition to Senate Democrats: Use committee control to investigate corporate America.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08de7f03-b5d8-4f95-8cb6-77cea520e39c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) For the past two years, the makeup of U.S. Senate committees has been divided evenly between Democrats and Republicans to reflect the 50-50 split in the full chamber. However, with an incoming 51-49 majority (when including Independents), Senate Democrats can now have true control of committees, opening the door to more investigative authority. Through greater oversight ability and subpoena power, committee and subcommittee chairs can begin to tackle corruption in corporate America.
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0d4a86f-4e7c-479a-a3f3-9a2dc857afc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Senate progressives plan to [rise to the challenge](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b6f87ba-18a7-470f-ab1a-3f64808e5fe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Sen. Bernie Sanders is expected to chair the Health, Education, Labor and Pensions Committee, where he hopes to investigate price gouging of pharmaceutical drugs. Sen. Richard Blumenthal is in line to become chair of the Consumer Production and Product Safety Subcommittee and wants to look into Big Tech, and Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse is ready to investigate energy companies and climate change in the Budget Committee. It’s clear that Senate Democrats are already preparing to use their majority strategically in the next Congress. Our senators will have no shortage of work to prioritize—nominations, legislation, budgeting—but they can walk and chew gum at the same time. As their responsibilities begin to pile up, let’s remind Senate Democrats that we’re counting on them to follow through on their promises to investigate corporate America. [**Sign the petition to Senate Democrats: Use committee control to investigate corporate America.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8600778c-2779-491c-b53c-d938432d70cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3750d48ec8ae4b118e78ec2da719f1bf&_e=J-QJrmbbOhnDM-9HMuS1W1tbM1cVYZPoFTIQZgYIzDqb7mUbuY3yUyy2jGqcSo6XFpdjWOeHPOWj2jlhkym17wNRR5k3q2HGT8N0VtFPDyBUeWrffupsu9PUVs3ZJoofOH2ewuLuiuYKxZdterzZ6koX6Sa5TLw814D4MgfWdAMdK0stNxiMrbgAgrWwRkSl4HNTMw7S-8ukeLbdVM-ANz-6TKelbqAjH1JTCpGER-yAA8fBYJRwwJ408u3K7i7iSYnTJSaLb23Rt2aGfcU7XUB6QbYVNUSpD_8Re67-eTjvBdxA1FZjfaoo0hgU_9KXw91Wr2GzglavfAM2r1c7w2DYjNUenZoyfLS4Yoww-KFdjq4PAmT8W0PTDhCldFEn)

| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a “Great Reset?”
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3750d48ec8ae4b118e78ec2da719f1bf&_e=J-QJrmbbOhnDM-9HMuS1W1tbM1cVYZPoFTIQZgYIzDqb7mUbuY3yUyy2jGqcSo6XFpdjWOeHPOWj2jlhkym17wNRR5k3q2HGT8N0VtFPDyBUeWrffupsu9PUVs3ZJoofOH2ewuLuiuYKxZdterzZ6koX6Sa5TLw814D4MgfWdAMdK0stNxiMrbgAgrWwRkSl4HNTMw7S-8ukeLbdVM-ANz-6TKelbqAjH1JTCpGER-xSbz3j8HEeCbMV64FGRCBgZn6AxINB-y24s6pybuBLf_Y2a3Cuml36VWYi31AdzTZg_kGVGy8cgeAKz9ccT5gqVoQXfh6nzfEJ_kS1OCykZpAoBvsHG03MMiCMSUsVMVC2beYEsjewG91PaBEyyT4U)****[”](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3750d48ec8ae4b118e78ec2da719f1bf&_e=J-QJrmbbOhnDM-9HMuS1W1tbM1cVYZPoFTIQZgYIzDqb7mUbuY3yUyy2jGqcSo6XFpdjWOeHPOWj2jlhkym17wNRR5k3q2HGT8N0VtFPDyBUeWrffupsu9PUVs3ZJoofOH2ewuLuiuYKxZdterzZ6koX6Sa5TLw814D4MgfWdAMdK0stNxiMrbgAgrWwRkSl4HNTMw7S-8ukeLbdVM-ANz-6TKelbqAjH1JTCpGER-yw-FrD65wg4HbHoUfEEqlwyPFZS2psLNUoSvsN-79HrTETFgc3thK3Q9VFMuYnEJ5KBTtfnh3Xcw4oNYC6BylQD1G0JNu6mTdZ6oiCaNmcPIiBmDt0-IAVhuMTI26M23cxUTvgP97F7I5_-e-WtDZI) —is now available as a free online video series.**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3750d48ec8ae4b118e78ec2da719f1bf&_e=J-QJrmbbOhnDM-9HMuS1W1tbM1cVYZPoFTIQZgYIzDqb7mUbuY3yUyy2jGqcSo6XFpdjWOeHPOWj2jlhkym17wNRR5k3q2HGT8N0VtFPDyBUeWrffupsu9PUVs3ZJoofOH2ewuLuiuYKxZdterzZ6koX6Sa5TLw814D4MgfWdAMdK0stNxiMrbgAgrWwRkSl4HNTMw7S-8ukeLbdVM-ANz-6TKelbqAjH1JTCpGER-w2scOUhMppMs3G38ksrSrerHzA3gmUwRB-3RBG3hlg7ri95ZvG3dhY86UBEXx3i99aIQeX-BkbPdmrKqeMUIqZFYfPc3yV2EIw8a4F_HS0y2yKEMZQfyXJPjTbAWFQqV93td3vWSh3mtD6jeCutV7J)

| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3750d48ec8ae4b118e78ec2da719f1bf&_e=J-QJrmbbOhnDM-9HMuS1W1tbM1cVYZPoFTIQZgYIzDqb7mUbuY3yUyy2jGqcSo6XFpdjWOeHPOWj2jlhkym17wNRR5k3q2HGT8N0VtFPDyBUeWrffupsu9PUVs3ZJoofOH2ewuLuiuYKxZdterzZ6koX6Sa5TLw814D4MgfWdAMdK0stNxiMrbgAgrWwRkSl4HNTMw7S-8ukeLbdVM-ANz-6TKelbqAjH1JTCpGER-x1PWNC0Oh5WiTvZRn1ScGMxUFyP5f-kUTF1QSfAO2lF8gBPdo61o3D2DAhTlF9D39b4ohFAINFnWOWM7XXRsy-XmrxAV9OxTHXrS77AGl3evyE3st-P8euadZ24j7wNcSivkqjk7hhsjGc9Zw_Kx-X)**
You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more.
As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty.
Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8a3cbbead7b46e0abb8a06c8f5d6a77&_e=PTRaYRJYvsapW0dIKfzPxRWH_dltmdccV1Qewxfu9BWOE9eXtT_Tv2HpUJ15vEuw4UFvXxqQNPkT-8ZdPm-cKDeP6MjuVgsYRIoGPDHNIF3Q4NjmnUGT3b1_Jy7huIxFA-iwN7ot96U1FdduLgl8qRJM3BuTu3uvZU0alAd0TSovc5LJIfqpICVkzLwgibjeOYf15O73SL2giywtdgTwG7KNZccwXFCE3CtC_yhXQwdUkdyojIrN9wHFHTEvlm28TvQjW2HL04mrJa3GwG2wQxq1lMSlyVgw53DHw3VQv85kzSTBJEOjVNAtMWE02DqeciB4ABfAn2F_gnqgy1WvoxUD-d9fEkgx5Rdvezc_g91JLuN0MMQMOi7EXLIrqRxf)****["](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8a3cbbead7b46e0abb8a06c8f5d6a77&_e=PTRaYRJYvsapW0dIKfzPxRWH_dltmdccV1Qewxfu9BWOE9eXtT_Tv2HpUJ15vEuw4UFvXxqQNPkT-8ZdPm-cKDeP6MjuVgsYRIoGPDHNIF3Q4NjmnUGT3b1_Jy7huIxFA-iwN7ot96U1FdduLgl8qRJM3BuTu3uvZU0alAd0TSovc5LJIfqpICVkzLwgibjeOYf15O73SL2giywtdgTwG7KNZccwXFCE3CtC_yhXQweYB3oVOF62GpBeDJIaA3BCwUpe8XHjcYldo4JxulzMA2IG_6yrZTTX0K0Yc3e72Ci8RGEvVYvwGCvLbMbP7pba0z-IYRW2oPyHk9piKlx__FNmD2anPOFBtvOBEqygQ-f4a-BXu3yJqcn0t72kkZnk) --is now available as a free online video series.**

* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset

body:
Senate Republicans just handed American children a lump of coal for the holidays. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56243330/384355425/1573765503?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZkODRmMi00YjgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iTdYapuA7sUdG8K1-siILkLLkoe8SXE8kKMlI7xyZTc=&emci=8c642343-3877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=116d84f2-4b81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540) Folks — Senate Republicans just handed America's children a big lump of coal for the holidays. **For weeks, I’ve urged my colleagues to support the expanded Child Tax Credit to lift millions of kids out of poverty, but Republican leaders have refused to even come to the negotiating table.** As a result, the new year will be needlessly harder for Colorado families. [**Please add your name alongside mine to call on Congress to reinstate the expanded Child Tax Credit →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56243331/384355426/1573765503?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZkODRmMi00YjgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iTdYapuA7sUdG8K1-siILkLLkoe8SXE8kKMlI7xyZTc=&emci=8c642343-3877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=116d84f2-4b81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540) | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56243332/384355427/1573765503?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZkODRmMi00YjgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iTdYapuA7sUdG8K1-siILkLLkoe8SXE8kKMlI7xyZTc=&emci=8c642343-3877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=116d84f2-4b81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540)**
---
When we finally expanded the Child Tax Credit in 2021, it did exactly what we said it would: cut childhood poverty nearly in half, reduced hunger by 25%, and helped millions of families afford essentials like groceries and rent.
But in this year’s government funding negotiations, Republicans didn't give a thought to the millions of children facing hunger, homelessness, and empty stockings this holiday season.
I believe we should invest in our families and children — not give more tax breaks to big corporations. We should build an economy that works for everyone — not just those already on top.
**So team, I will continue fighting to make the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, and I hope to have you with me.**
[**Sign my petition TODAY to demand that Republicans in Washington support expanding the CTC and help put an end to child poverty in this country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56243333/384355428/1573765503?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZkODRmMi00YjgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iTdYapuA7sUdG8K1-siILkLLkoe8SXE8kKMlI7xyZTc=&emci=8c642343-3877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=116d84f2-4b81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1295540)

clean_body: Senate Republicans just handed American children a lump of coal for the holidays. | Folks — Senate Republicans just handed America's children a big lump of coal for the holidays. For weeks, I’ve urged my colleagues to support the expanded Child Tax Credit to lift millions of kids out of poverty, but Republican leaders have refused to even come to the negotiating table. As a result, the new year will be needlessly harder for Colorado families. | When we finally expanded the Child Tax Credit in 2021, it did exactly what we said it would: cut childhood poverty nearly in half, reduced hunger by 25%, and helped millions of families afford essentials like groceries and rent. But in this year’s government funding negotiations, Republicans didn't give a thought to the millions of children facing hunger, homelessness, and empty stockings this holiday season. I believe we should invest in our families and children — not give more tax breaks to big corporations. We should build an economy that works for everyone — not just those already on top. So team, I will continue fighting to make the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, and I hope to have you with me. Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Parents deserve CHOICE! OPEN if you agree…
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7671%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=R92E1hzN66%2bUDtyKoqG89A&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98762%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T%2fjpO1LYaHPahJCzeUkTaQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021 ...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98763%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0iX3%2fgpOz5%2fSInn%2bGkvwPg&sysid=1)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - _and kids deserve better_ - [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98764%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2JdfFvmvNwotjk9yioS1WA&sysid=1)**
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98775%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GAlRqRtnrMbhIkFK%2fPSP%2bw&sysid=1)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. **Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include ...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98776%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vag%2f9cbOB9%2bQlmFYqoEqOA&sysid=1)**

---
| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers’ unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you’ll take a stand today! >>_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98777%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QFLgTLTCZSDPErKrmleAgQ&sysid=1)**
---
| | [**SIGN TODAY >> STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98778%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ro6ZdeZ8xWzDk9HfHfiuOQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Thank you, Digital Team American Federation of Children
