name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. |
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1ba20c4168d842218b5e5045f64ba834&_e=F6A-X4J_Qo29XRlG5WXSdfSZHnw65bU4OBgHRGD0uxNk2KELhmm23TcO3vc_8cYWowINPCgDv2Q7KV_N2txXkNhlRzJB7qox6ayt76b5_dwoDEXbKH8Ja4IiGSWg0dDZj0MBiSn9OUE0Osram17WJGwZWvZrjb6eyWhvwNV56DZkWRvG8h-fb4vwImKz-4QeYseRXOVco5NB364t4xhTvIHo_4tAM2BkDE71Yso3NeW9m9wG8ZMuAGpkTNqYSBlP359AUjVtEyN8sMY-U-6kSARz2ZXzJpHJYgidZNVOCPy7pL6eDhqVyydL-oZjA7luvZCC5JhINKRIrdetbQkkD4pltn5tbfsRG14qNLS76UilKRX8axHzq2_3ZGUTzU-3)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1ba20c4168d842218b5e5045f64ba834&_e=F6A-X4J_Qo29XRlG5WXSdfSZHnw65bU4OBgHRGD0uxNk2KELhmm23TcO3vc_8cYWowINPCgDv2Q7KV_N2txXkNhlRzJB7qox6ayt76b5_dwoDEXbKH8Ja4IiGSWg0dDZj0MBiSn9OUE0Osram17WJGwZWvZrjb6eyWhvwNV56DZkWRvG8h-fb4vwImKz-4QeYseRXOVco5NB364t4xhTvIHo_4tAM2BkDE71Yso3NeV8ewocCsL96QCzJHixw4QbGJP6snief4-xCiSU8HyC9_0pDZmqLMzwszyzFdfrkmgeolA7xQhvGmLlKfS8oqjsIu8dKD-yTtOvSlja7ZkV6iYn2YIpv39LJlt5Prxg_fAvZMKbPgCmwfB-qxZJKv8-) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1ba20c4168d842218b5e5045f64ba834&_e=F6A-X4J_Qo29XRlG5WXSdfSZHnw65bU4OBgHRGD0uxNk2KELhmm23TcO3vc_8cYWowINPCgDv2Q7KV_N2txXkNhlRzJB7qox6ayt76b5_dwoDEXbKH8Ja4IiGSWg0dDZj0MBiSn9OUE0Osram17WJGwZWvZrjb6eyWhvwNV56DZkWRvG8h-fb4vwImKz-4QeYseRXOVco5NB364t4xhTvIHo_4tAM2BkDE71Yso3NeUE1AHqOB8pXEoakXMOcnyL-Icre4BxcbvevmkmgkSDXuJrdUn7p8uMpP-ExfN0csyqKPWRWTni62ctbMOavQSgQKVjrWrGDhz8_rm4368Q_GHC09eWpguHW89HuyghtTzNY2WmbQzj0QQ1eRqtVDRv)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1ba20c4168d842218b5e5045f64ba834&_e=F6A-X4J_Qo29XRlG5WXSdfSZHnw65bU4OBgHRGD0uxNk2KELhmm23TcO3vc_8cYWowINPCgDv2Q7KV_N2txXkNhlRzJB7qox6ayt76b5_dwoDEXbKH8Ja4IiGSWg0dDZj0MBiSn9OUE0Osram17WJGwZWvZrjb6eyWhvwNV56DZkWRvG8h-fb4vwImKz-4QeYseRXOVco5NB364t4xhTvIHo_4tAM2BkDE71Yso3NeXCOjcODXoWPrEKxGFHkuXjd9-vW21dURIdqiZLhJHTj5skGjlzCDhDlMkDHyP0tVa_NlYswY45F2zdUQN7OFx1LPNOr54G2xLIuUPnYDul0ipPU4eVjhe_ve0TxbHw7KUdMCMVnGhApyEpQEdjLFpA)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1ba20c4168d842218b5e5045f64ba834&_e=F6A-X4J_Qo29XRlG5WXSdfSZHnw65bU4OBgHRGD0uxNk2KELhmm23TcO3vc_8cYWowINPCgDv2Q7KV_N2txXkNhlRzJB7qox6ayt76b5_dwoDEXbKH8Ja4IiGSWg0dDZj0MBiSn9OUE0Osram17WJGwZWvZrjb6eyWhvwNV56DZkWRvG8h-fb4vwImKz-4QeYseRXOVco5NB364t4xhTvIHo_4tAM2BkDE71Yso3NeXUJGEwRxyg9y3yFTvh3eCzndB8OLNjQ1Wr9qD5LwQdkarpBSrSxO5j2Gi0Jw_05pJ8LMLj1z_qlb0twLEKe1R9m39DPeIEPoPXHWJntnFt2lw_xYUrWt5ZoOCpQUgwbhNOZgfrL65HrNYuSZo-YGGb)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1ba20c4168d842218b5e5045f64ba834&_e=F6A-X4J_Qo29XRlG5WXSdfSZHnw65bU4OBgHRGD0uxNk2KELhmm23TcO3vc_8cYWowINPCgDv2Q7KV_N2txXkNhlRzJB7qox6ayt76b5_dwoDEXbKH8Ja4IiGSWg0dDZj0MBiSn9OUE0Osram17WJGwZWvZrjb6eyWhvwNV56DZkWRvG8h-fb4vwImKz-4QeYseRXOVco5NB364t4xhTvIHo_4tAM2BkDE71Yso3NeUbczl0Qv4i0SfAxjmPF7IRPRt8rVAI99mx-edF6BEXPAJs0C9cgheb0fQ2NVOsQqjsKDlc-4naDny4tqoI3nCk9bruIPG8brWd85C5bln9SRSTOYZX76T3VwIzM0jwoQHH8VnjwG4WjovOCTPA6obJ)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My police officer son is facing life in prison
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a**[ donation today,](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62108324:JD8ixGGTN:m:1:3334294963:B6C56398B98179B139256D4B8A477054:r)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

name: Tina Kotek
subject: December Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Hi Peter,

I hope your holiday preparations are going smoothly! No surprise, but I’m behind on my gift shopping.

We’re halfway through December, and it’s been an incredibly busy month as we’ve been preparing for the new year and the beginning of my term as Governor of Oregon.

I wanted to take a moment to share a little of what we’ve been up to.

Last week, I delivered the keynote address at the Oregon Business Council’s 20th annual Oregon Leadership Summit. In the speech, I outlined my top policy priorities: housing and homelessness, access to mental health and addiction treatment, and successful schools.

I also provided the foundational goals for my administration — building trust across Oregon, increasing accountability and oversight in state government, and encouraging new and more robust intergovernmental and private-sector partnerships.

I know that we can accomplish big things. But it can only happen if we work together. That’s why I was excited to announce the “One Oregon” Listening Tour, where I’ll visit every Oregon county in my first year in office. This tour will focus on building partnerships across the state, a critical first step in getting results that benefit all Oregonians.

I’m also building out my team. To help me achieve the most for Oregonians, I’ve hired Andrea Cooper as my incoming Chief of Staff. She’s extremely strategic, collaborative, and qualified, with fifteen years of experience working in Oregon government and public service. Not to mention she’s a lifelong Portland Trail Blazers fan, which is always a plus.

We also launched a transition website – where you can track what’s happening, invite me to future events, and let us know if you’re interested in joining our team. [https://www.oregon.gov/govelect/Pages/default.aspx?utm_source=GOV&utm_medium=egov_redirect&utm_campaign=https%3A%2F%2Fgovelect.oregon.gov]

This is certainly only the beginning. We’re putting in the work to ensure that on Day One, my entire administration and I will be able to continue to create progress in Oregon.

As Governor, I’ll fight for you and deliver on the promises I made during the campaign. That means delivering results for ALL of Oregon. I know that when all Oregonians do better, we are all safer, healthier, and more prosperous.

I’ll keep you updated on my progress. I can’t wait to get to work to solve problems with you.

Thank you and Happy Holidays!

— Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]
Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

This time, it's extremist Confederate cosplayer and 2020 election-denier Doug Mastriano. Yesterday, Mastriano retweeted fake poll results that showed him beating Bob in a head-to-head race. | | | Friend, With Georgia’s Senate runoff over, once again, extremism was defeated at the ballot. Just like many of you, we’re celebrating these wins. But we’re also looking ahead to build on our reserves for 2024. Some ask, "Why so soon?" **Here’s what we know:** We can’t pause the critical work we’re doing. Extremists who put politics above people _still_ wield power. They refuse to work across the aisle, which stands in the way of pro-infrastructure, pro-worker, and pro-democracy legislation. | [**BUILD OUR COALITION »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56254583/384381090/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_221220_pause&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmQ3YjcxNC02MzgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sycuRdXM9KUAdtWGMYdLuvS_vAu6acU9AibxOoQxCZo=&emci=20513f29-9180-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=82d7b714-6381-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=9512399)
---
If you think 2022 was tough, the Senate map in 2024 is even more challenging. Of the 31 Senate seats up for grabs, _nine_ of them are deemed battleground seats!
_**What can we do about that?**_
**We’ve got to start building our coalition now.** We start working today to **_rally reasonable Americans of all parties_** who believe in our fundamental rights and our democracy.

clean_body: Here’s why we can’t pause... | | | | | | Friend, With Georgia’s Senate runoff over, once again, extremism was defeated at the ballot. Just like many of you, we’re celebrating these wins. But we’re also looking ahead to build on our reserves for 2024. Some ask, "Why so soon?" Here’s what we know: We can’t pause the critical work we’re doing. Extremists who put politics above people still wield power. They refuse to work across the aisle, which stands in the way of pro-infrastructure, pro-worker, and pro-democracy legislation. | If you think 2022 was tough, the Senate map in 2024 is even more challenging. Of the 31 Senate seats up for grabs, nine of them are deemed battleground seats! What can we do about that? We’ve got to start building our coalition now. We start working today to rally reasonable Americans of all parties who believe in our fundamental rights and our democracy. Thank you, Team BAFAF | | Copyright © 2022 Build Alaska's Future Action Fund, All rights reserved. Contributions are not tax deductible. Our mailing address is: Build Alaska's Future Action Fund 645 G St Ste 100-1122 Anchorage, AK 99501-3443 Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you. body:
How I'm going to make it happen
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zid4m39ltdsv5cgk4i7vg0ekcd6si7amroqnvun0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3ncspj2d33csoe6p9m6dpm4pb0m5qj4plleeomat1nm1hn1o9j6pim6sdkskrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32t5jcdjr4cb6ejgb6p37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmep33c5ie4oj0s8iv0)

| Fellow Patriot, **I 'm officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.** If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zia3gj1oclhb7rupf84b56ke3qohsaf6uhlpfn4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdgm9oj2c3h2bs)** My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. **[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z311gem0s4qcpj4s2dqh805th8v8fmkm4jjfkndo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdgm9oj2c3h2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhoe2ffjsudra25c4cp910ge7cnic6pmkmbe55dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdgm9oj2c3h2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he'll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhaasevpt5vvr3e4ok08t777t7uni35on9vu6i88_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdgm9oj2c3h2bs)**

**[Just $30--or anything you can afford--will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zllreb80pjmhvvsjoirafumel53jmsq0qvu26e1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdgm9oj2c3h2bs)**

Andy Biggs

name: Josh Lafazan
subject: These are serious lies. George Santos must resign [petition]
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56256434/384382113/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZlMGI3NS02NDgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwwygFrwTtfkR7fwXnE_z0BvW32Sno5zFuvENsiPA10=&emci=8fc480a7-6381-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=8f6e0b75-6481-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=17773801)
---

| | **The revelations about Congressman-elect George Santos are outrageous.** It seems that nearly everything he told voters before the election was a lie – a false work history, a fake charity, a fake college degree, and where he lived. There are serious questions about his personal finances and his campaign's finances, as disclosed to the public. The residents of New York's 3rd District deserve a Member of Congress who is working full-time on their behalf, not defending himself against a scandal of his own making. We deserve a Member of Congress we can trust to tell the truth. **> > [Peter, please sign my petition calling on George Santos to resign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56256443/384382119/-1996794634?contactdata=%2BY6AbQjvwe9zNinv0WCQRsJT3ci0DYXhi%2FWGZla61i%2FXKexuSbcksHnesgeV0ZZgSoolM9pY4uI6t4%2FUD4OsN2rHFR558ayKbXesIMFbtyQ5zQezqUtmZteaY9xjymdreAcOzWETqIFWEaKSZ1e%2BshHgOpojQLfupCX5LoeIsu4%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZlMGI3NS02NDgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwwygFrwTtfkR7fwXnE_z0BvW32Sno5zFuvENsiPA10=&emci=8fc480a7-6381-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=8f6e0b75-6481-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=17773801)** We're also calling on the House Ethics Committee to launch an investigation, and we're calling on the Department of Justice to determine if these lies or other falsehoods constitute unlawful activity. **He has disqualified himself from serving in public office and he should resign immediately.** [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56256450/384382131/-1996794634?contactdata=%2BY6AbQjvwe9zNinv0WCQRsJT3ci0DYXhi%2FWGZla61i%2FXKexuSbcksHnesgeV0ZZgSoolM9pY4uI6t4%2FUD4OsN2rHFR558ayKbXesIMFbtyQ5zQezqUtmZteaY9xjymdreAcOzWETqIFWEaKSZ1e%2BshHgOpojQLfupCX5LoeIsu4%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZlMGI3NS02NDgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwwygFrwTtfkR7fwXnE_z0BvW32Sno5zFuvENsiPA10=&emci=8fc480a7-6381-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=8f6e0b75-6481-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=17773801) Stay tuned. More to come. _Josh_ |

clean_body: | | | | The revelations about Congressman-elect George Santos are outrageous. It seems that nearly everything he told voters before the election was a lie – a false work history, a fake charity, a fake college degree, and where he lived. There are serious questions about his personal finances and his campaign's finances, as disclosed to the public. The residents of New York's 3rd District deserve a Member of Congress who is working full-time on their behalf, not defending himself against a scandal of his own making. We deserve a Member of Congress we can trust to tell the truth. > > We're also calling on the House Ethics Committee to launch an investigation, and we're calling on the Department of Justice to determine if these lies or other falsehoods constitute unlawful activity. He has disqualified himself from serving in public office and he should resign immediately. Stay tuned. More to come. Josh | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. subject: This Christmas, Kyrsten Sinema is the Grinch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |

Peter, _“It could be, perhaps, that her shoes were too tight._ ___It could be her head wasn't screwed on just right._ ___But I think that the most likely reason of all,_ _may have been that her campaign bank account was two sizes too small.”_ Yep, it’s true: Kyrsten Sinema is a Grinch. How else would you describe someone who waits until the day after Democrats win their 51st Seat in the Senate to announce she’s leaving the party? Or someone who does this during a vote to raise the minimum wage:

clean_body: | | Peter, “It could be, perhaps, that her shoes were too tight. _It could be her head wasn't screwed on just right. _But I think that the most likely reason of all, may have been that her campaign bank account was two sizes too small.” Yep, it’s true: Kyrsten Sinema is a Grinch. How else would you describe someone who waits until the day after Democrats win their 51st Seat in the Senate to announce she’s leaving the party? Or someone who does this during a vote to raise the minimum wage: , unlike the Grinch, we don’t anticipate Sinema’s heart will grow three sizes anytime soon. Instead, we expect more obstruction. We expect her to continue upholding the filibuster instead of protecting our basic rights – just as she has already prevented Democrats from restoring abortion rights and protecting voting rights. But this story can still have a happy ending... when we boot this Grinch from the Senate and replace her with a strong Democrat who will put Arizonans above Wall Street donors. ** ** Wishing you and yours a peaceful holiday season, -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 (Formerly Primary Sinema) Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . | | Friend,

During this Holiday season, be sure to watch the [final episode](https://wesleyfortexas.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=724e4968b7cd9603cc2411e9c&id=3574b818d9&e=6b59dbf13a) of Saving American Energy, featuring Plains All American Pipeline! This week, we traveled to Cushing, Oklahoma to tour the largest crude oil storage facility in the entire country.
[](https://wesleyfortexas.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=724e4968b7cd9603cc2411e9c&id=10d6caa857&e=6b59dbf13a)
Over 2 million barrels of oil flow through this storage facility every single day with a total capacity of over 100 million barrels! Since 1994, more than 112 grades of crude oil from 23 countries have been transported through the Plains Cushing Terminal, which serves as a central hub for American Energy.

Watch the full episode [here](https://wesleyfortexas.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=724e4968b7cd9603cc2411e9c&id=49cedfff49&e=6b59dbf13a)!

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=021fcfaee4b6445da466bf064da0aba8&_e=5voEzVPx7dJtwLXFpR8c-RJX-HOg88cEulWj9sqQPr7VYnfaVEUkj7xR4Q7tjPBlqiBtyAhG5SdbA-e-BMeMLBqC5g1XwvjgmfUR3kr_2zZgm_yIsaJqsipc_EN_MWyNGvAH-W6GBVjQN7ZB9Yw1pcEtHQBrTBrEprh0IA73NACRFOsP57rShjApn9WEreqLlLkq-XW-sXK-JGnB90p7Tu0tZBCyHsDazLspCGzMfw53heuruHmVxf3HgfloBk5j2VeoqPe2kDMQGtP6tqnbgLj2fhid4l4Crn88wd6649NkFxxstMq6SoZqFh-jSUyj_AcggPlWSpaDVPVe7220Peegs-qnjgoGVzQTJH5cNlOI_88S0HQyXfQqnHQvhQG7Zihc8t_iFnBZwwjrXP_rrIcgcx7eXOQWj4_2IYyYB0zRNIXSmHpkYQlGhFGAh0zN)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=021fcfaee4b6445da466bf064da0aba8&_e=5voEzVPx7dJtwLXFpR8c-RJX-HOg88cEulWj9sqQPr7VYnfaVEUkj7xR4Q7tjPBlqiBtyAhG5SdbA-e-BMeMLBqC5g1XwvjgmfUR3kr_2zZgm_yIsaJqsipc_EN_MWyNGvAH-W6GBVjQN7ZB9Yw1pcEtHQBrTBrEprh0IA73NACRFOsP57rShjApn9WEreqLlLkq-XW-sXK-JGnB90p7Tu0tZBCyHsDazLspCGzMfw53heuruHmVxf3HgfloBk5j2VeoqPe2kDMQGtP6tqnbgOeQ0MIoJUu3DUyG5yTq-2XbzUQhUDtt44Ax5V2fy19OWPRruulfrQ1iiUdLAZzcbXQRf5G5Z-36mbwzn96QMZEyBrIyWm3TLB7xOnxgjFqd5UQTBpKDN_AR6pSOS43BYg-E3NhF7taPJ3wjWvfMJCwOZuzn9ZpSS_-kvzSwpzLE)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=021fcfaee4b6445da466bf064da0aba8&_e=5voEzVPx7dJtwLXFpR8c-RJX-HOg88cEulWj9sqQPr7VYnfaVEUkj7xR4Q7tjPBlqiBtyAhG5SdbA-e-BMeMLBqC5g1XwvjgmfUR3kr_2zZgm_yIsaJqsipc_EN_MWyNGvAH-W6GBVjQN7ZB9Yw1pcEtHQBrTBrEprh0IA73NACRFOsP57rShjApn9WEreqLlLkq-XW-sXK-JGnB90p7Tu0tZBCyHsDazLspCGzMfw53heuruHmVxf3HgfloBk5j2VeoqPe2kDMQGtP6tqnbgENiA2I6LpE2O63ZHeZvKYuLbZj3LItOFtfxj3mrEQxt5_lkKaQ-X_49rSnxCRtELpzp71jpcapTtwv753Xxaxxzqgrjm1mzZqDoUbc43-Rm6apx2Fj-oEdf-yD8acW1cX1YCV7JuMlMcbyAin9jnRLrJ-eh5qMt8DOYctBxLa7u)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=021fcfaee4b6445da466bf064da0aba8&_e=5voEzVPx7dJtwLXFpR8c-RJX-HOg88cEulWj9sqQPr7VYnfaVEUkj7xR4Q7tjPBlqiBtyAhG5SdbA-e-BMeMLBqC5g1XwvjgmfUR3kr_2zZgm_yIsaJqsipc_EN_MWyNGvAH-W6GBVjQN7ZB9Yw1pcEtHQBrTBrEprh0IA73NACRFOsP57rShjApn9WEreqLlLkq-XW-sXK-JGnB90p7Tu0tZBCyHsDazLspCGzMfw53heuruHmVxf3HgfloBk5j2VeoqPe2kDMQGtP6tqnbgA10AUWw-anymGGTKCVsB2C2bz5I5Ch_8631QL1iwPjrxZc10TlvC-y3NP70k0BoozK_YN6GBp5kz1rD66RHN6pZrtEKMSK6QaRUatUv7-Jrt6bjgValz3rM8zmH7LZYbU9gCMkoyKVOk978ihAp322hkF2V9ilenEVpDIH8B-yf).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Holidays Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,
# [#]
I wanted to take a moment to wish you and yours a safe, and wonderful holiday season.

The support that you have given me and my team this year is inspiring. Because of you, we were able to uphold our shared values on issues like climate change, affordable health care, quality education, gun violence prevention, and so much more.

While 2022 was packed with Covid-19, redistricting, and the midterm elections, your support was unwavering and the bedrock of this campaign. Looking back, I’m thankful that every time we called on you to help you took a stand and met the challenge head-on, and I can’t wait to see what the future holds for this team.

I hope this holiday season is filled with warmth and the people you care most about.

All my best,

Mike

body:

| Dear Fellow American,

This is a very special time of the year...and I want to wish you and all those close to you a very Merry Christmas and holiday season, and a happy and prosperous New Year.

[**I also want to ask you to consider making a year-end contribution to Judicial Watch.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61509&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)** Contributions are tax-deductible!**

Your support will help us keep:
* Fighting in state and federal courts to protect the **integrity of our elections** ;

* Exposing taxpayer funding of Marxist, racist **Critical Race Theory propaganda** in our schools;

* Exposing the **Biden border crisis** and the politically-driven failure of the Biden administration to enforce our laws against illegal immigration; and

* Investigating **Biden family****corruption.**

These efforts represent just a small portion of our record number of investigations and lawsuits fighting public corruption and government secrecy.

[**Please help us with your best contribution...and thank you for all you do for Judicial Watch!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61509&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President

body:
The radical Left attempts to push us closer to socialism, and it starts by indoctrinating our children and silencing parents.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=8c013d0afca545b7aaa608de3a8a4122&_t=lScnaNp1EooCVjLMtG1JGz3_OuBWaklp9o8o2YRF2KllVfkQMnNFujBiXifi8pa7y-j9OLAri3QKjYUMZyqyxBVldcZVU7ljke_HRo4I2Ws%3D)_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c013d0afca545b7aaa608de3a8a4122&_e=MqIk9W7eOG2IxdPb14IAiM0Fxl6J4eJeu7KRXZZIp_xg8re1pvpUNtcrPET4cYYGUiecmD7k-RUHl04kTmWtVcKWF4Mk1BrEmqpQTRRjNQ0fe3PmQJE9IbSlJEaGhsIxTdnYZS8nrfmaflJB4TF_xERht4tRiPEtrZ5rI11JKjehTb6BCukhZwpusGD8_L3tXYf7oNZxP8cMqENWvZXoE5_LUcwh6pFWkxxmaF3wCHN4SDRTHBQTik6fUaPhau1wxzEgyu2UO2RIwD80QIZilSXuQ8oKfr1EyyG5voWMlxMTt1uofrfH6muCqpM2BO0wOUX0Xmh-psSOx1S9yitfg-3CFrCpBGRLKjZ-nMPD4Xj0MneZoOJaLwoCNh0jnsET)
---
Peter, When the Youngkin administration took office earlier this year, Gov. Northam’s universal mask mandate was still in place all across Virginia. Kids were forced to wear masks for eight hours a day, and parents had _no say_ in the matter. One of the first things we did was roll back Northam’s emergency powers and adapt to the current phase in the pandemic. **That meant providing parents with the ability to opt-out of a school mask mandate. ** _Why?_ Because if you, Peter, as a parent, decide to mask your child, then that’s your choice... but EVERY parent should be empowered to make this very individualized decision.
---
[**FIGHT FOR PARENTS’ RIGHTS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c013d0afca545b7aaa608de3a8a4122&_e=MqIk9W7eOG2IxdPb14IAiM0Fxl6J4eJeu7KRXZZIp_xg8re1pvpUNtcrPET4cYYGUiecmD7k-RUHl04kTmWtVcKWF4Mk1BrEmqpQTRRjNQ0fe3PmQJE9IbSlJEaGhsIxTdnYZS8nrfmaflJB4TF_xERht4tRiPEtrZ5rI11JKjehTb6BCukhZwpusGD8_L3tXYf7oNZxP8cMqENWvZXoE5_LUcwh6pFWkxxmaF3wCHODRXCJOt_xhN9OwrNJLyqmegajlqPsLHMBz39Gg5US4e-_eTWrsXhbtwFig3xr9FtHJWH2YaQKAil3SZ7faIHWd_dJ6BQtkHCXSrZUvbYQKmo_9JVlImvJC56UfmXAY93vBhqgh9G56Fxsaz0waRlj)
---
When Loudoun County parents sued their school board for failing to offer a mask opt-out option, Gov. Youngkin, Superintendent of Public Instruction Balow, and I joined the lawsuit. **We asked the Court to uphold the opt-out option so parents had a say in the masks of their child – ****_and the Court sided with us!_**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c013d0afca545b7aaa608de3a8a4122&_e=MqIk9W7eOG2IxdPb14IAiM0Fxl6J4eJeu7KRXZZIp_xg8re1pvpUNtcrPET4cYYGUiecmD7k-RUHl04kTmWtVcKWF4Mk1BrEmqpQTRRjNQ0fe3PmQJE9IbSlJEaGhsIxTdnYZS8nrfmaflJB4TF_xERht4tRiPEtrZ5rI11JKjehTb6BCukhZwpusGD8_L3tXYf7oNZxP8cMqENWvZXoE5_LUcwh6pFWkxxmaF3wCHMZoHg64G7MSx4ETy2h34OaNcHsbrMN9w4Gzq70Ykx1CbR1I9g8dago-Sw-_7sBv4YjCnFKoEQcbjwyOEVbjMtkcdKiXbZdmWoScQXZ8QpmVS0r9LU2kvBkrfVygjLKXCXjUftD6DChfRhaHayFGPxs)
---
[**PROTECT PARENTS’ RIGHTS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c013d0afca545b7aaa608de3a8a4122&_e=MqIk9W7eOG2IxdPb14IAiM0Fxl6J4eJeu7KRXZZIp_xg8re1pvpUNtcrPET4cYYGUiecmD7k-RUHl04kTmWtVcKWF4Mk1BrEmqpQTRRjNQ0fe3PmQJE9IbSlJEaGhsIxTdnYZS8nrfmaflJB4TF_xERht4tRiPEtrZ5rI11JKjehTb6BCukhZwpusGD8_L3tXYf7oNZxP8cMqENWvZXoE5_LUcwh6pFWkxxmaF3wCHMaTPpBM1xvNM4Nxrr5N1HurWcPKqH8AFGnKSQ40btWyP7MZ5BIbnbyEc8VgtPu8byHqD7Gi-NLj3-UZOEVPqHMHdRuIUfJrwn9pJUQxfzc9hZAt4-zLf9EmXLrbaB-khf9CafeOFbrE71sHYTRkvVa)
---
When a Virginia House of Delegate member indicated she was drafting a bill to criminalize parents who disagreed with his or her child’s chosen gender identity, I stepped in and said enough. **Despite these repeated incidents, the far Left doesn’t seem to understand that Virginia parents want to be involved in their children’s lives.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c013d0afca545b7aaa608de3a8a4122&_e=MqIk9W7eOG2IxdPb14IAiM0Fxl6J4eJeu7KRXZZIp_xg8re1pvpUNtcrPET4cYYGUiecmD7k-RUHl04kTmWtVcKWF4Mk1BrEmqpQTRRjNQ0fe3PmQJE9IbSlJEaGhsIxTdnYZS8nrfmaflJB4TF_xERht4tRiPEtrZ5rI11JKjehTb6BCukhZwpusGD8_L3tXYf7oNZxP8cMqENWvZXoE5_LUcwh6pFWkxxmaF3wCHN3aXvo2pmXy5Hbqe5rHb84ST9V_zFf7Mkxn6W7EbdEsQ-Iuy5k2jmEc036BTryw3BIvbrE7rArn85Sm2c32OdJQ9V2kIpqMZ96F1_o5Gdzt3Pw5N6gu5UfESgyfB8l9en8iU2sbQIq6QRC-r29Ltxy)
---
Peter, I’m a husband and a father, and I can tell you one thing... I want to know what my children are being taught in the classroom. I want to have a say in what happens in their lives. **_And so many other parents in the Commonwealth feel the exact same way._**
---
[**KEEP PARENTS INVOLVED**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8c013d0afca545b7aaa608de3a8a4122&_e=MqIk9W7eOG2IxdPb14IAiM0Fxl6J4eJeu7KRXZZIp_xg8re1pvpUNtcrPET4cYYGUiecmD7k-RUHl04kTmWtVcKWF4Mk1BrEmqpQTRRjNQ0fe3PmQJE9IbSlJEaGhsIxTdnYZS8nrfmaflJB4TF_xERht4tRiPEtrZ5rI11JKjehTb6BCukhZwpusGD8_L3tXYf7oNZxP8cMqENWvZXoE5_LUcwh6pFWkxxmaF3wCHN1TfkGYXC_t958IQXplinUy8xm9e0QYrkEnDpUmLFtrpcwTo-cExTKZbix7cqaCRZ-tDTtuWE7X7AI8Z0gMCjHCFcJHncXhcsZqsTj1buPJpHC6Nl9EDq-wXeZPaVR2gTqEeKS4CXFIxjF47zh6HhR)
---

name: James C. Roberts, American Veterans Center
subject: Will you sign this Christmas Card for our heroic veterans?
body:
This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nati
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp2p65ecibuvsrm2idkm8bc6ja6h2fe834idfq3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nation. The American Veterans Center does more than _any other organization_ to tell the stories and preserve the legacies of America’s heroes. It’s been our honor to be trusted by work with thousands of veterans, from World War II to Iraq and Afghanistan. [**We've set a goal of 50,000 signatures for this special card by Christmas Eve, December 24th. Will you add your name now it?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfprc5beuniitrvm9p8juco7827gigkd2ksv1sko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5usvusk64q1g012j7c32e00je4efqfi11ole2k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
This holiday season, just like every year, it's vitally important to show our heroic veterans the support the deserve. **By reaching our goal of 50,000 signatures, we're sending a message of support to let all those who have served know that patriotic Americans will forever remain thankful for their sacrifice for our nation.** _And we’ll share the Christmas card signatures and personal notes of support with veterans from World War II through to today._ As thousands of the courageous men and women who served in World War II, Korea, Vietnam and beyond leave us each day, it is our duty to let those who have served know that we have not _and will not_ forget their sacrifice. [**Friend, will you please add your name to this special Christmas card to let our heroic veterans know that they are remembered this holiday season?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv93jpoq8emi2kdq4kdb9fnfs064pa7s5vqq11f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1bc1oj76271enhk07ftglk8l7cnvl79k808tc30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
As we prepare to celebrate the joy of Christmas, we ask that you join us in supporting American veterans, by sending them a special and meaningful Christmas greeting from their fellow Americans. According to the U.S. Census Bureau's most recent study, there are currently about 16.5 million veterans in the United States. The majority of them served during the Vietnam War era and are over the age of 75. Those brave men and women put their lives on the line to preserve our freedom at home, and now it’s up to us to show them that we remember and appreciate their service and sacrifice — especially in this holiday season. [**I hope you’ll take just a moment to do that right now by signing AVC’s Christmas Card.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1scmaptjgo3ne7a2ls1g0sfu7u1hivar3a6dmao_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvod7vjcviah1b0aquptkqmb6dfpd4frv85ngh78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
Thank you, Merry Christmas, and God bless our heroic veterans!
---
James Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpab14agbej89qc7436smln54ourt8rg7mcj341g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdimcpr6c9h2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

As thousands of the courageous men and women who served in World War II, Korea, Vietnam and beyond leave us each day, it is our duty to let those who have served know that we have not and will not forget their sacrifice. As we prepare to celebrate the joy of Christmas, we ask that you join us in supporting American veterans, by sending them a special and meaningful Christmas greeting from their fellow Americans. According to the U.S. Census Bureau's most recent study, there are currently about 16.5 million veterans in the United States. The majority of them served during the Vietnam War era and are over the age of 75. Those brave men and women put their lives on the line to preserve our freedom at home, and now it’s up to us to show them that we remember and appreciate their service and sacrifice — especially in this holiday season. Thank you, Merry Christmas, and God bless our heroic veterans! James Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing hospitals who butcher children for profit
body:
Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0231%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=cWFZAEaa5Z%2f%2b%2f78cus1Khw&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. _Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.” I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl - Chloe Cole - after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. **I need your help to fund this legal battle.** [**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43450%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ChcfzasHm0lHvA7Q%2fhs6zQ&sysid=1) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.” **Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.”** Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. **Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it’s time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman--and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won - we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you’re in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43451%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fq2Y9C1BkL%2bRd3ESrDz0Fw&sysid=1) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight--likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43452%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=703JZGaYjxkcWd2qBEdhCw&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43453%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OK2E0hLLkEXkGg%2brZcilrQ&sysid=1)
---
| | P.S. If we don’t fight back now and hold these medical “professionals” accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can’t allow that. [**So please, join the fight to help us get justice for Chloe and save the future of our children with a tax-deductible gift of $35 more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43454%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8Qs63WXbKsuVIeG96ajVTQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43465%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=arFM7sY71Yw0tHkH4Xgsyw&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43466%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uzsqMh2Kzjp2JzZUPQ15Gg&sysid=1)

name: James C. Roberts, American Veterans Center
subject: Will you sign this Christmas Card for our heroic veterans?
body:
This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nati
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjib4o7rf79mkn16rjkf71ljlovmv7paiqo0a1fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
Friend, This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nation. The American Veterans Center does more than _any other organization_ to tell the stories and preserve the legacies of America’s heroes. It’s been our honor to be trusted by work with thousands of veterans, from World War II to Iraq and Afghanistan. [**We've set a goal of 50,000 signatures for this special card by Christmas Eve, December 24th. Will you add your name now it?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5a6u9npopakl2835qqdhkkp1hvh8ddd8qt4rpm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7gjih4k46jfato23leubrk1kfbsrph5af7vknm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
This holiday season, just like every year, it's vitally important to show our heroic veterans the support the deserve. **By reaching our goal of 50,000 signatures, we're sending a message of support to let all those who have served know that patriotic Americans will forever remain thankful for their sacrifice for our nation.** _And we’ll share the Christmas card signatures and personal notes of support with veterans from World War II through to today._ As thousands of the courageous men and women who served in World War II, Korea, Vietnam and beyond leave us each day, it is our duty to let those who have served know that we have not _and will not_ forget their sacrifice. [**Friend, will you please add your name to this special Christmas card to let our heroic veterans know that they are remembered this holiday season?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm9djpfckslosmapfb4rt8cs6qpu71n17tdl2j8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43tldb4320sp1j0mkmq6e7vb2oibvclfl1e67f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
As we prepare to celebrate the joy of Christmas, we ask that you join us in supporting American veterans, by sending them a special and meaningful Christmas greeting from their fellow Americans. According to the U.S. Census Bureau's most recent study, there are currently about 16.5 million veterans in the United States. The majority of them served during the Vietnam War era and are over the age of 75. Those brave men and women put their lives on the line to preserve our freedom at home, and now it’s up to us to show them that we remember and appreciate their service and sacrifice — especially in this holiday season. [**I hope you’ll take just a moment to do that right now by signing AVC’s Christmas Card.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zscu9hfivs1phcebetlcdtsj57j944nk3u70n0jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4ukp1q65hhvhbj5v17fg1iuqihcdnjj4id3fp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
Thank you, Merry Christmas, and God bless our heroic veterans!
---
James Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm3q7bgat8gh294hj82dlc618v7mi4qr7ks27jqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim2or2c5h2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Those brave men and women put their lives on the line to preserve our freedom at home, and now it’s up to us to show them that we remember and appreciate their service and sacrifice — especially in this holiday season. Thank you, Merry Christmas, and God bless our heroic veterans! James Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0f82ae435224f158b8012e378e2f516&_e=uvvHmDWBigoeBK_qjmSJlasT4M9K6HxleeMvz07B-s6uWki3kvcI0siMR0fyDt0Ly-oKTETdo3ruU_J631gj5YxZMEiVhJt_5gE5WdmVxm9OW_M-rG954PRYSRufB5M3Ub0_A6vXm6L69D5Wm_aBRjhtODbVTbErhG-g-nHAb1SOnhtun1ya4ZEMOjkVpKzzFdPyb3QtJMfdUD8txN4Vu0uFCt78dvDZ9JXVOqnBxQaquZEcmOiRXslB-pVFq8kc2PNHs-z_1FPRqoDi8QSawEoaTsDvXf8erYZP2RwcTiJMyKobenJb5fGd9wd-uLf5U1z27EE2-XW3Q6NOLEzX0BJqjsbOv02bW9W4rKDnFgyySOZcC0a5PhZvwOuU8xSdPy2nq4SUgmzRjXKP4bi8CcNVuIY8VbnydSHRYdR6NOg%3D)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0f82ae435224f158b8012e378e2f516&_e=uvvHmDWBigoeBK_qjmSJlasT4M9K6HxleeMvz07B-s6uWki3kvcI0siMR0fyDt0Ly-oKTETdo3ruU_J631gj5YxZMEiVhJt_5gE5WdmVxm9OW_M-rG954PRYSRufB5M3Ub0_A6vXm6L69D5Wm_aBRjhtODbVTbErhG-g-nHAb1SOnhtun1ya4ZEMOjkVpKzzFdPyb3QtJMfdUD8txN4Vu0uFCt78dvDZ9JXVOqnBxQaquZEcmOiRXslB-pVFq8kc2PNHs-z_1FPRqoDi8QSawOfHExKGnc6kjdL3I1e2xzo3RUwLfnG0zc7FQAIIrxwohd899vVX7toRnrxJeJV2LpsYHgQG6U59p64LXM7ZpsAQ5GohE33_7wQkwBQTuyFMIG30qr4DvKOMRjCCPBWwRyReAxrOJwIbwbIxGAefLag%3D)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - _and kids deserve better_ - [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0f82ae435224f158b8012e378e2f516&_e=uvvHmDWBigoeBK_qjmSJlasT4M9K6HxleeMvz07B-s6uWki3kvcI0siMR0fyDt0Ly-oKTETdo3ruU_J631gj5YxZMEiVhJt_5gE5WdmVxm9OW_M-rG954PRYSRufB5M3Ub0_A6vXm6L69D5Wm_aBRjhtODbVTbErhG-g-nHAb1SOnhtun1ya4ZEMOjkVpKzzFdPyb3QtJMfdUD8txN4Vu0uFCt78dvDZ9JXVOqnBxQaquZEcmOiRXslB-pVFq8kc2PNHs-z_1FPRqoDi8QSawE3vFFBPEN2co851jco8Raq9HDY3wJ6W6-K-RviQ0M3pnSWjREaB2UseK9wXfg6VD-OH94FxpeDGIQBiu78f6pf_fcqwkgmwrk6-jjQ-21CBLSxmqhrqm2XifV6AE8hniK_a6HFd6lNsd16t4KUxYZk%3D)**
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0f82ae435224f158b8012e378e2f516&_e=uvvHmDWBigoeBK_qjmSJlasT4M9K6HxleeMvz07B-s6uWki3kvcI0siMR0fyDt0Ly-oKTETdo3ruU_J631gj5YxZMEiVhJt_5gE5WdmVxm9OW_M-rG954PRYSRufB5M3Ub0_A6vXm6L69D5Wm_aBRjhtODbVTbErhG-g-nHAb1SOnhtun1ya4ZEMOjkVpKzzFdPyb3QtJMfdUD8txN4Vu0uFCt78dvDZ9JXVOqnBxQaquZEcmOiRXslB-pVFq8kc2PNHs-z_1FPRqoDi8QSawOL5Xr9E8bbkvclEL0No8RVXt41nwC-X_sg-mJfnHPgQ8Biqp_OJykVmAlVL9Uaf6UnBmOnkgQd3O7XPCjPJBaawXOxJTD3TNPBFmK7pROw_DkxlN0aRFOJD2vgwZj5Jp-1Yb8Sn9bsUuWKomLaS9rw%3D)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. **Some of the Education Freedom Pledge 's top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0f82ae435224f158b8012e378e2f516&_e=uvvHmDWBigoeBK_qjmSJlasT4M9K6HxleeMvz07B-s6uWki3kvcI0siMR0fyDt0Ly-oKTETdo3ruU_J631gj5YxZMEiVhJt_5gE5WdmVxm9OW_M-rG954PRYSRufB5M3Ub0_A6vXm6L69D5Wm_aBRjhtODbVTbErhG-g-nHAb1SOnhtun1ya4ZEMOjkVpKzzFdPyb3QtJMfdUD8txN4Vu0uFCt78dvDZ9JXVOqnBxQaquZEcmOiRXslB-pVFq8kc2PNHs-z_1FPRqoDi8QSawC_EpvAue72fuu2aFYbxoH69x3M9bnajq7sRkIfegEWmLpgQi2iaQqrE7W1n2L46h-FzmlTbJsSboT5RiWSJveIDgzlb5Uo9kM0p0xTZRtXCko-RCVB-9Ztz3EzMoCJZxTcxhoTq6zRdfMd8VPVgAoM%3D)**

| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you 'll take a stand today! >>_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0f82ae435224f158b8012e378e2f516&_e=uvvHmDWBigoeBK_qjmSJlasT4M9K6HxleeMvz07B-s6uWki3kvcI0siMR0fyDt0Ly-oKTETdo3ruU_J631gj5YxZMEiVhJt_5gE5WdmVxm9OW_M-rG954PRYSRufB5M3Ub0_A6vXm6L69D5Wm_aBRjhtODbVTbErhG-g-nHAb1SOnhtun1ya4ZEMOjkVpKzzFdPyb3QtJMfdUD8txN4Vu0uFCt78dvDZ9JXVOqnBxQaquZEcmOiRXslB-pVFq8kc2PNHs-z_1FPRqoDi8QSawMHNpdbb2E_4rKrzLoS9bdMTWNlE-5FKfGIPHYOliWG4vIkcYkYcXcv07DNZa7XLidRA_-BmCjxIUMWO8z--Ri09PsmqTTGkwzQtm64--x0BLTmA7f4Wx2R4DxAWMzi7rP4RcsCewGWBDebrM1vR-0Y%3D)**

clean_body: The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! | | | | | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021... to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country. The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE! Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend? Here is the pledge ... | | " I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school." | | | | Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - and kids deserve better - | | | | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. Some of the Education Freedom Pledge 's top signers include... | | Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr. | | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, and we need your voice. If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.** | | | | Thank you, Digital Team American Federation of Children | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | | Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Congressman Brendan Boyle
subject: BREAKING: Trump Tax Returns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Boyle
body:
Team, yesterday was an important day for those of us who believe that nobody is above accountability. Today, I was part of the group of lawmakers who took the unprecedented step of...| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56241679/384347875/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFhNGQ0Mi00ODgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuNENnjioVweBOqXtIDZBuWsXPyiy5WVq2IR2Hq7brc=)
---
| | **Friend, yesterday was a win for the idea of holding those in power accountable.
**
---
**Yesterday afternoon, I voted to make Donald Trump's tax returns public to the American people. I did it because I believe NOBODY should be able to use their privilege or authority to hide the truth.**
---
[STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56241680/384347876/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFhNGQ0Mi00ODgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuNENnjioVweBOqXtIDZBuWsXPyiy5WVq2IR2Hq7brc=)
---
| | **Regardless of what comes to light in the days and weeks to come, Democrats in Congress, acting with the interest of the American people in mind, have pulled the curtain back on Donald Trump's efforts to avoid public accountability.** **And while we've won this round, this battle isn't over. We have an incoming Republican House majority that is still under the Trump spell. And there is only one way to break that spell: _to retake our Democratic majority in 2024._** **This fight doesn't begin in two years or six months. It begins today. I'm working right now to support my colleagues and candidates who will retake the seats necessary to restore our Democratic majority in 2024. But to win, we need you help. ** **So as we close out 2022, I hope you'll continue to stand with us as we take this fight into the new year.**
---
[STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56241681/384347877/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFhNGQ0Mi00ODgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuNENnjioVweBOqXtIDZBuWsXPyiy5WVq2IR2Hq7brc=)
---
Thanks for your continued support.
Congressman Brendan Boyle

---

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8ab87806cfb4c4da1806fc6e27cd4ba&_e=8YPPfvzJpR1wF1mSo_vex0ujQyc_0mr_IYOi5FazQe7PbRGHNICY4cl0AFC5AjPBY6v7QBHr7FwEmwMYxeiXqSPKYUWaBkFKJDd8P6i4PbOGDx4m2TtSgFfXQPIMA-Nao9NKKgHAMpvsW9K5Rdlu5NvM-uW8w2MODQKbbGkcKaCAgKA8EV585M1LN8c3ZjO4Rmezg5SEXsUwzU60fUgxaZ08t9-1wYixd0TwpuM8Bwk1i8iIulGB8ruShKQKx09hNRJO5OC54W9tQ75uRXC0eDt86mjihU14XL6EqhsEvJ0QKBep-NBUybI8ZFiWByqt)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I 'm officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8ab87806cfb4c4da1806fc6e27cd4ba&_e=8YPPfvzJpR1wF1mSo_vex0ujQyc_0mr_IYOi5FazQe7PbRGHNICY4cl0AFC5AjPBY6v7QBHr7FwEmwMYxeiXqSPKYUWaBkFKJDd8P6i4PbOGDx4m2TtSgFfXQPIMA-Nao9NKKgHAMpvsW9K5Rdlu5NvM-uW8w2MODQKbbGkcKaCnf6LpGXSFxEOFWK-0-8UADH__Pldz6HwJIyWMEl8FG06iKnXiJVEoEZuqF3BeBt10R8K5MW76cNCf76ETkdpdpoj90NdqxQLqLbNUSqdg6bYPAc2RVTJYpcBkCHDVk2vWU_hySBVzQVLvFlXv_h7O)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8ab87806cfb4c4da1806fc6e27cd4ba&_e=8YPPfvzJpR1wF1mSo_vex0ujQyc_0mr_IYOi5FazQe7PbRGHNICY4cl0AFC5AjPBY6v7QBHr7FwEmwMYxeiXqSPKYUWaBkFKJDd8P6i4PbOGDx4m2TtSgFfXQPIMA-Nao9NKKgHAMpvsW9K5Rdlu5NvM-uW8w2MODQKbbGkcKaCSDF1HcWmJdSGVh8v44cjLDEIfyKWePe7bzvq_EERSy1xJNo2sIK91Cl4Kw9RF4BvruNt0I_5KeQX9lLVJg_yMEPSZ5-0AXe7LwLgF5MwKC9ph5j4JTnp6gw4DTpZphFz_V4ZoJg8HfqNh0XFi2Vzv)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8ab87806cfb4c4da1806fc6e27cd4ba&_e=8YPPfvzJpR1wF1mSo_vex0ujQyc_0mr_IYOi5FazQe7PbRGHNICY4cl0AFC5AjPBY6v7QBHr7FwEmwMYxeiXqSPKYUWaBkFKJDd8P6i4PbOGDx4m2TtSgFfXQPIMA-Nao9NKKgHAMpvsW9K5Rdlu5NvM-uW8w2MODQKbbGkcKaDLB9KS7f7xEQ_gipQxhM6BL0_BbRRFDc42u0naK2tm75DMHTQBarE0t5rCnzw4ttoC5Lt2USHMh0l9bWEaaC4msu13yxqBESYcHTKPe391nJimXh-nbr2JQQ-FQsr0wXgQiF5vljJGXNfmae5uPB_L)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he'll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves.**

name: James C. Roberts, American Veterans Center
subject: Send a note of support to all who served this Holiday season
body:
This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nati
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcllhanq9kb982ik8ip8ejr6a5is8ht6hjc1156o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
Friend, This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nation. The American Veterans Center does more than _any other organization_ to tell the stories and preserve the legacies of America’s heroes. It’s been our honor to be trusted by work with thousands of veterans, from World War II to Iraq and Afghanistan. [**We've set a goal of 50,000 signatures for this special card by Christmas Eve, December 24th. Will you add your name now it?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zafacqs7uracobm6li92amqmq314vp9psmt9jvd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2hrekpcqet50a3otk4aafn1e1guog9eq4405jv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
This holiday season, just like every year, it's vitally important to show our heroic veterans the support the deserve. **By reaching our goal of 50,000 signatures, we're sending a message of support to let all those who have served know that patriotic Americans will forever remain thankful for their sacrifice for our nation.** _And we’ll share the Christmas card signatures and personal notes of support with veterans from World War II through to today._ As thousands of the courageous men and women who served in World War II, Korea, Vietnam and beyond leave us each day, it is our duty to let those who have served know that we have not _and will not_ forget their sacrifice. [**Friend, will you please add your name to this special Christmas card to let our heroic veterans know that they are remembered this holiday season?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2u5itekp5rlj08cmrqt2kqhd2i4jvbenikdpn1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhvr1hcg1kigvqimii3pklvj4ntp3r4m7ri5mc10_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
As we prepare to celebrate the joy of Christmas, we ask that you join us in supporting American veterans, by sending them a special and meaningful Christmas greeting from their fellow Americans. According to the U.S. Census Bureau's most recent study, there are currently about 16.5 million veterans in the United States. The majority of them served during the Vietnam War era and are over the age of 75. Those brave men and women put their lives on the line to preserve our freedom at home, and now it’s up to us to show them that we remember and appreciate their service and sacrifice — especially in this holiday season. [**I hope you’ll take just a moment to do that right now by signing AVC’s Christmas Card.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7ikvp1q51kvvpbgfkvce0uem5g5m2k1n6a2c33o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1ri04feadn0orqcp3beuko1lq2bcjl48f2dnugo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
Thank you, Merry Christmas, and God bless our heroic veterans!
---
James Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zffjv2qq8upu1uo4rfnfrlki0uu0a6verkm81s18_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdim6ob6c3h2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zi3onk7q1hin4uc0nh35851mvftc4fmg7fa4e4g0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhgh672v8q3itdj8d8qihnmj69gna8tkl5stfivg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chhmaor1cpge49fg)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Please give us a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Ever since the campaign ended, our online fundraising has slowed to a drip.
#
Derek -
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets before our year-end fundraising drive comes to a close. Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here is the truth:
Ever since the campaign ended, our online fundraising has slowed to a drip.
We get it. We asked a lot during the election.
But we need your help to turn it around.
In just a few days, we’ll have a new Congress. We’ll have a new Republican House majority to stop. We’ll have work that needs done in the Senate.
In the meantime we have spending bills, and a number of other issues we’re advocating on that impact Veterans and Military Families.
And we need your help with that.
The work we do is not just electoral. And it’s often the legislative work we do that impacts Veterans and Military Families the most. So please:
[**Can you make a contribution of $5, $10 or any amount you can afford to VoteVets today? We’ll put it right to work fighting for Veterans and Military Families in Congress.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221221-1-15&t=1&akid=7240%2E3013755%2E6UE-s8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you so much, and happy holidays. The team at VoteVets PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

name: Nikki Haley
subject: the promise of America
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b29c6debd0456994fd48af086cbca2&_e=me6a9yeO1lPelH5x_SwHeUq4MjgaWdRLKr26z3ETHX0LqNEulpJJ599fllKb41lB59aa3YFJBdBoAJyCWfaSxAR7LTdfAkSjICuay-jl-YLO4v2no1hMskdwiZ8DgqKsDMzTm9dSGFHN2dwE14tvMle0jZ6npg-r-VYpULBiYOG_IpEmtZ-RGBzuVV-Mvbr9SB6fFNGLAAFA-7spMk8ZwRkWfhaDD5DM3AUgN99ZvtMPKy3_Yj3x3jQ0VsRrMzAksUVcZnTjx2SlOKkRb81JCLgF6djghvClP018ylt7qnbiexmU49BZ3wDADn0sV3s7W0FdpA_tjKc269LmXL5_7ruv5PHPnjmYXO0aOyW6XHY%3D)
---
Friend,
---
As a child, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. I’m the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. My parents reminded me every day how blessed we are to live in America. When my family moved to Bamburg, South Carolina, no one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. No day was easy, but every day was better than the last. Then, something very American happened. People began to move past our differences and saw what made us similar. I haven’t just seen the American story. I’ve lived the American story. When I worked in my mom’s store at the age of 13, I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. I ran for state legislature so I could fix the problems I saw happening around me. Despite being the underdog, people believed in me, and they helped me defeat a 30-year incumbent. When I was growing up, no one could have imagined that I would one day become a state legislator, a governor, and UN Ambassador. But that’s what makes America special... _And it’s why I’ll never stop fighting for America._ That’s why I launched Stand For America PAC two years ago and it’s why I’ve been working non-stop to support conservative candidates across the country. **[If you want to join me to rally behind freedom-loving conservatives, stand for conservative values, and defend our country’s freedoms, I’m humbly asking you to donate just $1 or more today.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b29c6debd0456994fd48af086cbca2&_e=me6a9yeO1lPelH5x_SwHeUq4MjgaWdRLKr26z3ETHX0LqNEulpJJ599fllKb41lB59aa3YFJBdBoAJyCWfaSxAR7LTdfAkSjICuay-jl-YLO4v2no1hMskdwiZ8DgqKsDMzTm9dSGFHN2dwE14tvMle0jZ6npg-r-VYpULBiYOG_IpEmtZ-RGBzuVV-Mvbr9SB6fFNGLAAFA-7spMk8ZwXjxuQNZ30HFPvoZ6-X9x-1gqxw5oE0vn3nW4HRMnyMwwufhJA3n7xLDbGGpYuJ49UlCXZaJSbpZVOrmYR3-1Yg5ExRAeyh51HAP9uN0ERUJtYE_I3L8zgXnJb8FkuL1U1gDuDkqgOggW2whksplApE%3D)** Thank you in advance for your generous contribution. My very best,
---
