clean_body: | | | Friend, As a child, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. I’m the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. My parents reminded me every day how blessed we are to live in America. When my family moved to Bamburg, South Carolina, no one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. No day was easy, but every day was better than the last. Then, something very American happened. People began to move past our differences and saw what made us similar. I haven’t just seen the American story. I’ve lived the American story. When I worked in my mom’s store at the age of 13, I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. I ran for state legislature so I could fix the problems I saw happening around me. Despite being the underdog, people believed in me, and they helped me defeat a 30-year incumbent. When I was growing up, no one could have imagined that I would one day become a state legislator, a governor, and UN Ambassador. But that’s what makes America special... And it’s why I’ll never stop fighting for America. That’s why I launched Stand For America PAC two years ago and it’s why I’ve been working non-stop to support conservative candidates across the country. Thank you in advance for your generous contribution. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. It’s called “If You Want Something Done...” and it profiles bold, courageous women and the lessons they teach us about making a difference, overcoming adversity, and sticking to principle. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America PAC does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Thank Madam Speaker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I’ve had the pleasure of serving with Nancy Pelosi since I got into Congress, and I have seen firsthand her ability to unify and get things done even when faced with GOP attacks. She’s been more than that to me, though. She’s also a mentor and friend.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)
Derek,
Speaker Nancy Pelosi recently announced that she is stepping down as the House Democratic leader, a role she’s served in for almost two decades. So I wanted to take a moment to thank Speaker Pelosi for her leadership and determination to move our country forward.
**[Before I speak further about Speaker Pelosi’s historic career, please take a moment to thank her by adding your name to our thank you card.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221221-pelosi-thank-you-vsp.CpaYvN&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_TYE_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221221-pelosi-thank-you-vsp.CpaYvN&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_TYE_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221221-pelosi-thank-you-vsp.CpaYvN&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_TYE_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)
---
I’ve had the pleasure of serving with Nancy Pelosi since I got into Congress, and I have seen firsthand her ability to unify and get things done even when faced with GOP attacks. She’s been more than that to me, though. She’s also a mentor and friend.
She fought back against the Bush administration and led the charge to help Democrats win back the House in 2006, ending 12 years of Republican control and leading to her becoming the first woman to be elected Speaker.
As Speaker, she continued to secure victories for Democrats in 2008, winning an astounding 257 seats, supporting the election of President Barack Obama, and securing the historic passage of the _Affordable Care Act_ in 2010.
During the Trump administration, Nancy Pelosi stood in the breach, defending our democracy and holding the president accountable, then helped Democrats win back the House in 2018, then the White House and Senate in 2020. **The last two years have been some of the most productive in the history of Congress, thanks to her leadership, and with no margin to spare.**
She hasn’t slowed down, and this week, President Biden signed our legislation to protect same-sex and interracial marriage into federal law with the _Respect for Marriage Act._
We owe Speaker Nancy Pelosi an enormous debt of gratitude; she has been steadfast to the Constitution and the American people, and steps down from House leadership with a record of accomplishment that will create lasting benefits for the American people.
**[So please, join me in thanking Speaker Pelosi by signing our thank you card to show your appreciation for her decades of service to our country.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221221-pelosi-thank-you-vsp.CpaYvN&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_TYE_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221221-pelosi-thank-you-vsp.CpaYvN&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_TYE_AC_20221221_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)
---
Thanks, Madam Speaker. For everything.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1487%2E5257348%2EwCIMH3)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Keeping costs low
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FwMJnP9joTJKxnr-tRr91Uio8WDqxkt0X4Uzqfu_Iu4=/cg3r_J5O7CNAWr9k-_vaElWVihdFeleykDaXJw3Exfk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20221221-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Since my career in Congress began, I've been committed to reducing the cost of prescription drugs.

I proudly helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act which, among its many benefits, allows Medicare to negotiate the prices of some of the most expensive and lifesaving medications for our fellow Americans. This major step forward will lower prescription drug costs for countless Americans and is long overdue.

What's more, the cost of lifesaving insulin has been capped at $35/month for patients on Medicare and seniors have Medicare out-of-pocket drug prices capped at $2,000 per year.

This law's passage was a major step forward in making healthcare more affordable for Virginians and I am proud to have advocated for it.

As I look ahead to my next term, I'm full of optimism about continuing this mission.

[_**Will you help build the foundation of this campaign by making a contribution today? I can 't continue my important work without you.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/FwMJnP9joTJKxnr-tRr91Uio8WDqxkt0X4Uzqfu_Iu4=/cg3r_J5O7CNAWr9k-_vaElWVihdFeleykDaXJw3Exfk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20221221-1-EM&amount=25)

Abigail

name: Shontel Brown
subject: My first full term in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I need your input, Peter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56260386/384397838/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_221221TopIssues_N_SB_30DO_G_4_N_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQzZDViYi03ODgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pSTO9Apz4Oj1wBmYx8Jw6CIl2_NEPysQn9jGj70py14=) Peter,

We’ve accomplished so much together since my 2021 special election. When you, my grassroots team, delivered me to Congress, I made sure to get to work delivering for the people of Ohio.

Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, Ohio is seeing millions in infrastructure funds go toward good jobs and investing directly into our communities. More than 1.6 million Ohioans are set to receive student loan forgiveness. We even helped lower healthcare premiums and put money back into the pockets of Ohioans through the Inflation Reduction Act.

[**_Now with the 2022 elections wrapped up, I’m headed into my first full term of Congress, and I need the full support of the team that’s got me this far. That’s why I’m asking you, Peter, what issues are top of mind as we head into 2023? name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: $3.99 promo – get together for a movie night!
body:
| | |
---
One of the best things about this time of year is that there is more time available to spend with family and friends. While December is busy, there are also breaks – kids are on break from school, many people are able to take a few days off of work, families visit, and people make spending time together a priority. In my house, we like to break out the board games, bake, and watch movies. I don’t know about you, but in terms of entertainment, this year has left me craving something substantial. If you agree, and you’re looking for something to watch with friends and family during your break, I highly recommend our documentary, _Innovation Race_ , which will satisfy that craving. And, while this film might not be of interest to little kids, middle schoolers and up will find it fascinating and will learn important information about our nation in an exciting way that they won’t forget. **And best of all – between now and January 1, 2023, it’s just $3.99 to watch the movie!****** So, go ahead and gather as a family, or invite your friends over to enjoy _Innovation Race_ from the comfort of your own home through a Virtual Cinema experience! It’s so easy to do – [just go to the website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTUtNDczZTdkNzZlN2E3NGQyYzhkNmNlNmQ1NzM2NDliNTciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHA6Ly93YXRjaC5pbm5vdmF0aW9ucmFjZW1vdmllLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQ2MjMwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/3-UO6PFFj99hDi2l4XxCnQ) and get your tickets and watch it when it works for you. Do it now, while the price is just $3.99!
---
[PURCHASE TICKETS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-z3-1is4UEp0yWlWEeojGA)
---
In Liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
|
---
**FILM SYNOPSIS** For the past century, America has been the world leader in ideas, invention, and innovation. Developing new technologies to solve complex issues as well as tools to make our lives more comfortable and efficient is the realization of the American dream for many. But our grip on ‘world leader’ status is loosening as China has emerged as a powerful political and industrial force. Today, China is threatening American innovation by exploiting weaknesses in US patent protection, and big tech is letting them get away with it. _Innovation Race_ explores these critical issues impacting all Americans, and proposes solutions for how we can restore US dominance in invention, technology and innovation.

clean_body: I don’t mean to be a Grinch. | Peter, I know the last thing you probably want to hear from me is a plea for a donation, but here it goes. | Because of YOUR efforts, we were able to raise enough money to stay competitive with Tim Ryan’s Hollywood War Chest and bring home a conservative victory for Ohio and for the U.S. Senate. There are just a few things that came from that victory that I need to tell you about. The Radical Left Establishment is coming after me harder than ever because I ruined their Socialist plans to turn Ohio into the next California. They’re already putting plans in place in Washington to keep me from protecting our rights, freedoms, and conservative values. The Democratic machine keeps raising millions of dollars in hopes of strengthening their Socialist grip across the nation. SOLUTION:FIGHT BACK I’m ready to stand up to the Left. Are you? SUBJECT: We are with you. Dear Congresswoman Cheney,

I might not agree with you on much, but we both know one thing to be true: _Trump-loving MAGA Republicans are a grave threat to our democracy._

That’s why I’m so thankful for your hard work on the Jan. 6th Commission. **You’ve bucked the corrupt Trump wing of your party to search for the TRUTH – _and I couldn’t be more grateful!_**

[Rep. Cheney, you’re the only Republican willing to stand up to Trump – and I want you to know I’m standing with you against his attacks. That’s why I’m signing this letter with a $1 donation to UniteDemocrats, to stand with you and help them defeat Trump‐loving Republicans »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56246378/384367900/-1927912107?amount=1&amounts=1,3,5,10&refcode=UD_20221221_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwZmM5NjFjLTU1ODEtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j69j8i_koPv8Hfoe29Gf7KKqDT5WTZw9-ldhqf7EvBc=) | [SIGN TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY IN HER PURSUIT FOR JUSTICE! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56246379/384367902/-1927912107?amount=1&refcode=UD_20221221_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwZmM5NjFjLTU1ODEtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j69j8i_koPv8Hfoe29Gf7KKqDT5WTZw9-ldhqf7EvBc=)

Congresswoman Cheney, I know you’ve faced attacks from your party before.

When you called out Donald Trump for inciting the deadly Jan. 6th insurrection, his cronies in Congress responded by _censuring_ your voice. _It was pathetic!_

| | Hi Peter, This is one of the busiest times of the year, so I'll make this brief. Have you used your [Oregon Political Tax Credit](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56261108/384401130/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhNjBiNzNlLTdmODEtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=knYpri3quRSsyKWazoaS89G8SSwXnXj5T8eOhDqJ65o=&emci=0d9f55f3-7c81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=0a60b73e-7f81-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) yet this year? If you're eligible, you can give $50 (if you file as an individual) or $100 (if you are part of a couple filing jointly) to a political group like the OLCV PAC and get it back when you file your taxes! You are eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
* You are an Oregon resident.
* You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2022.
* You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly).

| | Hi, it’s DLCC President Jessica Post here. I couldn't be more proud of the work we accomplished this year. Thanks to the support of this grassroots team we flipped FOUR target chambers and defended key majorities, all while the GOP outraised us quarter after quarter. We simply could not have done it without you, so from the bottom of my heart, _**thank you.**_ But, we can’t rest on our laurels if we want to build upon this year's momentum. We’ve got our work cut out for us at the start of 2023 with _five_ special elections in January alone. That’s why we’ve launched a **$500,000 goal** to help our candidates win in 2023 and beyond. **This deadline is so critical that a generous group of donors is matching each donation 7X through December 31st – our _biggest_ match of the year!** [We can’t do this work without you. We know just how important it is to elect state Democrats: From protecting abortion access to making it easier rather than harder for Americans to go to the ballot box, state legislators have a major impact on policy that affects day-to-day life.
The early investments you make now will have 7X the impact in key elections in 2023. **It’s why _right now_ is the most important time you could donate to help ensure we have every last resource going into the 2023 elections.**

clean_body: State Democrats beat the odds this cycle and secured major victories that will impact thousands of Americans' lives across the country. | | | | | Hi, it’s DLCC President Jessica Post here. I couldn't be more proud of the work we accomplished this year. Thanks to the support of this grassroots team we flipped FOUR target chambers and defended key majorities, all while the GOP outraised us quarter after quarter. We simply could not have done it without you, so from the bottom of my heart, thank you. But, we can’t rest on our laurels if we want to build upon this year's momentum. We’ve got our work cut out for us at the start of 2023 with five special elections in January alone. That’s why we’ve launched a $500,000 goal to help our candidates win in 2023 and beyond. This deadline is so critical that a generous group of donors is matching each donation 7X through December 31st – our biggest match of the year! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We know just how important it is to elect state Democrats: From protecting abortion access to making it easier rather than harder for Americans to go to the ballot box, state legislators have a major impact on policy that affects day-to-day life. The early investments you make now will have 7X the impact in key elections in 2023. It’s why right now is the most important time you could donate to help ensure we have every last resource going into the 2023 elections. State Democrats beat the odds this cycle and secured major victories that will impact millions of Americans' lives across the country, but there is still more work to do. Thanks for fighting with us, Jessica Post President, Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
It’s time to build on our wins. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56261739/384403714/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221221_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmI4OGZkYi04MzgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_x5-UpwW-oOM8WAvH-SHNP_QsW8GsoSkH1p-akonag=&emci=043b6580-6081-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=9bb88fdb-8381-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=252045)
---
Folks — We came into this year with election forecasters predicting that Mitch McConnell would take back the Senate — and we ended it by _growing_ the Democratic majority. It’s been decades since Democrats with a sitting president _gained_ power in the Senate during the midterms. It goes to show that we can buck even the toughest odds when we come together and fight to put people and our planet first. But we can’t afford to slow down now. Democrats will need to defend 23 of the 33 Senate seats up for re-election in 2024 — including mine in New Mexico — and the presidency. We won this year because we built a strong foundation early on. Now, we need to start again and bring in the resources necessary to win the next election. So I’m asking: **Can you chip in $10 or any amount to my campaign before our final public fundraising deadline of the year? clean_body: It’s time to build on our wins. Folks — We came into this year with election forecasters predicting that Mitch McConnell would take back the Senate — and we ended it by growing the Democratic majority. It’s been decades since Democrats with a sitting president gained power in the Senate during the midterms. It goes to show that we can buck even the toughest odds when we come together and fight to put people and our planet first. But we can’t afford to slow down now. Democrats will need to defend 23 of the 33 Senate seats up for re-election in 2024 — including mine in New Mexico — and the presidency. We won this year because we built a strong foundation early on. Now, we need to start again and bring in the resources necessary to win the next election. So I’m asking: Can you chip in $10 or any amount to my campaign before our final public fundraising deadline of the year? Early investments will make all the difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We have a lot to be proud of. We have the opportunity to build on all our wins by defending the Senate and the White House in 2024. Thanks for pitching in what you can. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hoping 15,000 of yinz + youse will pitch in.
#
Derek,
I’m taking an Oath of Office to become a U.S. Senator in less than a month.
Can you believe it?!
Our journey to this moment began a long time ago. In fact, and I’m not exaggerating here, _we would not have won PA_ \+ expanded our Senate majority without grassroots donors making super-early investments in our campaign.
The same logic applies now. If we want to keep building our grassroots strength, defend critical seats in 2024, and even win re-election, we can’t wait. **The best time to lay the groundwork is as early as possible AKA starting today.**
**[I’m hoping we’ll reach an end-of-year goal of 15,000 grassroots donors chipping in whatever they can by 11:59 PM on December 31. The $ amounts don’t matter, but proving our power in numbers does. Will you join your fellow donors who are pitching in now, Derek?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49612?refcode=em20221221-8170&t=1&akid=8170%2E434096%2EhAN_mE)**
**[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49620?refcode=em20221221-8170&t=20&akid=8170%2E434096%2EhAN_mE)**
Honestly, I’m kinda nervous setting our first major fundraising goal after winning in November... but at the same time, I know that the people on this team understand that we need to build up grassroots resources over a period of years, not months.
So I really think we can reach this goal if everyone (including you, Derek) chips in even just a few bucks, which is less than the cost of a cup of Sheetz coffee. 😉
**[Is there any chance you could make your first $5 donation to support our work today? I’m asking you directly because we need a lot of people to reach this 15,000 donor goal before the year ends.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49612?refcode=em20221221-8170&t=21&akid=8170%2E434096%2EhAN_mE)**
Thank you for your dedication to this team, Derek. 🙏
❤️ John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator-Elect

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221221-8170-footer&t=22&refcode2=8170_434096_hAN_mE&akid=8170%2E434096%2EhAN_mE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=8170%2E434096%2EhAN_mE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=8170%2E434096%2EhAN_mE)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

53% of the polling locations didn't work on election day.

Would you go on an airplane where half the engines didn't work?

If the legal system can't land this plane, Arizona is going to go into a tailspin.

Why isn’t the media talking about any of this?

This is the state of Journalism in Arizona.

We post numbers that suggest the voting irregularities in Arizona need further scrutiny.

And we get a smug partisan response. No intellectual curiosity. No journalistic ethics. They just laugh it off.

Enemy of the people.

clean_body: Our work is funded by grassroots folks pitching in, and it’s imperative that we hit the ground running next year to make the critical investments that will set our party up for success in 2023. | | Derek -- 2023 is just around the corner, and we’re tracking behind our goal and need to catch up before the end of the year. Our work is funded by grassroots folks pitching in donations of $7 or more at a time, and it’s imperative that we hit the ground running next year to make the critical investments that will set our party up for success in 2023, 2024, and beyond. So, Derek, we have to ask. Will you make a contribution to the DNC ahead of 2023? We’re counting on this grassroots team to help close our gap, and your donation of $7 will be put immediately to use funding our work to fight back against the GOP and elect Democrats nationwide. From passing critical legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act and the Respect for Marriage Act to flipping gubernatorial and state legislature seats across the country to holding our Senate majority, this grassroots team has been by our side every step of the way. But if we want to continue building on our progress, we need this team to step up again. Thank you, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Cori Bush
subject: JD made the difference in our campaign
body:
#
Peter,
There aren’t a lot of people in Congress like me. **Justice Democrats wants to change that.**
When I won in 2020, I became the first Black woman to ever represent Missouri in Congress. I’m a single mother, nurse, and pastor. I’m a survivor and an activist. **JD is fighting for a Congress where I’m not the exception.**
AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and I bring our real-life experiences to the table in Congress just like we did when Justice Democrats recruited us to run for office. That’s what they’re looking for now — leaders who are already fighting for their communities and ready to take the next step.
**JD needs our help to raise the funds it’ll take to recruit their next slate of bold, working-class, progressive leaders who will fight alongside me in Congress.**
[**Will you join me and support Justice Democrats with a $3 donation today to help them reach their $120,000 goal?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123701?refcode=em20221221-26672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123701?refcode=em20221221-26672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc)**
I never expected to go into politics. It didn’t seem like there was room for someone like me. But after the Ferguson Uprising in 2014 when we took to the streets for over 400 days for Michael Brown, I knew something needed to change.
My community encouraged me to run for office, but I didn’t know where to start. Justice Democrats recruited me in 2017 and endorsed me again in 2020 — helping us overcome the odds during a pandemic, and with an entire political machine against us. **With JD’s help, we made history.**
There are people already out there on the ground, fighting for change, just like I was, or Summer Lee, or Rashida Tlaib, or Ayanna Pressley. [**The Candidate Recruitment Fund will make sure JD has the resources they need to find and recruit those leaders. Will you chip in to support their $120,000 goal?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123701?refcode=em20221221-26672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc)
Justice Democrats saw my heart and understood the movement we could build in St. Louis. Now, they’re starting the search for the next slate of candidates who they’ll empower to mobilize their communities, take on the establishment, and win.
I know that JD will work tirelessly to find and recruit new bold, diverse progressive leaders, but I also know that it takes a lot of money to do work on that scale.
[**Your donation can make all the difference to Justice Democrats right now — and it’s an investment in the strength of our movement. Will you chip in $3 or more to the Candidate Recruitment Fund?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123701?refcode=em20221221-26672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc)
Always in solidarity,
Cori Bush
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123701?refcode=em20221221-26672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc)

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=24&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=25&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221221-26672-footer&t=26&refcode2=26672_1203867_wQuRuc&akid=26672%2E1203867%2EwQuRuc)**
---

JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za0vnbgc996vbbnmgkcl8qdosns5sv5mdr465v30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdhmeoj4cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z79hgd283ir1t478ar2cl5v09mqhg995la26kb1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdhmeoj4cdh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf9nluniaueqg09tbs1rbf65hfkdn3t1ojsrndqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdhmeoj4cdh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfl706k92v8c7poj4ocmijo31q1ui9u1d2kmtuao_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdhmeoj4cdh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjebtpv08mplr8cu19nro24jkuudatl23igqa7ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdhmeoj4cdh2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp13b9t71h53h52ip2haqil45s4ep3796e48ntig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdhmeoj4cdh2bs)**

---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $55](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znk9e5olhv1mo18hr8qtke9au5jt68fiep4f528o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cdhmeoj4cdh2bs)
---

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: Tim Burchett
subject: What we can do with our majority 🐘
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0ea6399564b448a9bdb4471a5b259d76&_e=WYxhIERtWqc7jOodrQMsoI37DoI6r4dPyIqTXNK_a_rlKe_nlUCzdruj3nGmNY5IvvCcs9MCcDgcg3npPLcIeVKBf2mFRISKjzeF-wAx_Ua-YMNTM2WmM6E03UdQm8H-u1QZ4c2KU5VvuejOrIUJSAK-7CdXAS36T2ncMuAe1ejGEUMG6BVJJn2cQ7nKIgZKfKFz-nZvs4NzddSG3jmTN-NmyqLafsqkWN6Q0Hr0LPzprCc7lJwaoBKrW0hf_yj48I3DEU_SIuEG_bvpKqOepSGyttiAIxfUCODvaKdDp5e0NMy19q3tUgkftCzalWprUSHKEuC6qm5QIDdcPEgjbQ%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend—I want to be straightforward with you.
You know that Republicans barely took back the House majority last month. We squeaked out our “W” by the skin of our teeth.
Now don’t get me wrong: there’s a lot we can do with the majority we won. Having the majority means we can:
🐘 Launch investigations
🐘 Block Biden’s ridiculous agenda
🐘 Save trillions of your taxpayer dollars from being shipped overseas
But to be completely honest, if we turn right back around and lose our majority in two years from now, anything we accomplish will be immediately reversed by the Democrats.
This means we must keep our new House majority in the next election if we’re going to make any real changes. That requires us to keep our foot on the gas and start fighting for it now.
---
[**STEP ON THE GAS**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0ea6399564b448a9bdb4471a5b259d76&_e=WYxhIERtWqc7jOodrQMsoI37DoI6r4dPyIqTXNK_a_rlKe_nlUCzdruj3nGmNY5IvvCcs9MCcDgcg3npPLcIeVKBf2mFRISKjzeF-wAx_Ua-YMNTM2WmM6E03UdQm8H-u1QZ4c2KU5VvuejOrIUJSAK-7CdXAS36T2ncMuAe1ejGEUMG6BVJJn2cQ7nKIgZKxyl58ljaWOPDfZ6tlsGkHu9zkm_xi6qDSzSfcf3SAzaTQhjqDvj8Rp7Z-8m8p5hCoDhJX65C4IaoasEjNQGBK5NR9m1J_RjZH0hEiMVqQnK3Y1HiCXueoZm8KHHGUjPe4viDZ-opFMCNUFT4A-9Vbw%3D%3D)
---
Because we didn’t fight so hard to win back the majority just to give it back to the liberals. Now, you know that I’m no swamp creature. You know that I’m a husband, father, former county mayor, and small business owner, and a proud East Tennessean to boot. body:
I know how crucial it is to listen to all of the voices in our community, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you now.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56257315/384383370/-1535365111?refcode=BLU-VFC-20221221-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk2MDc2Ny02NzgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kH1SJKQLmSfGXctSbYjpuC3sfwW2QblU_1D-uwGy21E=)

| Peter,

As I prepare for the year ahead, I can’t help but think about the needs of my community. I know there’s lots of work that needs to be done, but I wanted to hear from you directly: [_**what issues do you want to see me prioritize during my first term in office?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56257316/384383371/1269766429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk2MDc2Ny02NzgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kH1SJKQLmSfGXctSbYjpuC3sfwW2QblU_1D-uwGy21E=&emci=82f2e68e-8280-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=b6960767-6781-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=799895)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Untitled Document Friend, Mar-a-Lago awaits YOU. The same place I announced my run for President could be your next vacation. Because of your unwavering support and dedication to helping me SAVE AMERICA, I want to share something with YOU before anyone else: I am inviting YOU to WIN an EPIC trip to visit Mar-a-Lago. If you win this EXCLUSIVE opportunity, you’ll get the ultimate VIP EXPERIENCE: 🌴 Covered flight and hotel 🌴 The chance to bring the guest of YOUR choice 🌴 An incredible visit to Mar-a-Lago Friend, the best part is, I may even show up to meet YOU. The deadline to enter EXPIRES at 11:59 PM TONIGHT , so you’ll need to HURRY. There’s no one else I’d like to win this trip as much as YOU. This is a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME chance. Remember, I may even show up to meet you at Mar-a-Lago, so please HURRY and enter NOW. Thank you, Donald J. Trump NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting “FLORIDA” to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Trump Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt-out. Entries must be received between December 8, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on January 31, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. Round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America.

name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: Merry Christmas 🎄🇺🇸
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=fvqkEFKGuQve0iI&b=7O04v8rZU0TTo95iOnfkgQ)
---

Dear Friends,

**Christmas is upon us.** A time of hope and blessings where we all come together to share, fellowship, and reflect. During this festive season, as we honor the birth of our Lord and Saviour, Jesus Christ, **I want to wish you and your family a Merry Christmas**.

The last few years have been difficult with rising prices and record-high inflation. It has been hard on working families. But there is still hope because we have great conservatives in Florida like Gov. Ron DeSantis who are helping to protect our freedom and values.

As many of you know, there will be a special election for Florida House of Representatives District 24. I have thrown my hat into the ring **to pursue the honor of serving you as State Representative**. My heart's desire is to improve the quality of life for all Floridians and _to stand with Governor DeSantis in this important mission of protecting the Free State of Florida!_

I am committed to cutting taxes and runaway government spending _ _****_that causes inflation_****, ****_stopping the special interests and career politicians_**** , and ****_securing our community from the impact of illegal immigration_.****

But I need your help. I also want to hear from you and understand the issue that is most important to you.

**Please take a moment of your time to visit my website and let me know how I can best serve you. **[**To visit my website, click here.**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=fvqkEFKGuQve0iI&b=pIvRSOua5PjD20s4IS8PPw "https://ryanchamberlincampaign.com/")

I am completely confident that we can come together to keep Florida strong, and I believe that the best public servant is one who knows the heart of the people. **Please let me hear from you.**

God bless, and Merry Christmas.

Ryan D. Chamberlin

---

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsLGwcnOyc) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsLGwcnOyc)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Time to look to the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Thank you for supporting Pramila for the past two years.
#
Peter,
These last two years have been a rollercoaster, and you’ve stuck with Pramila the entire way. For that, we are so grateful.
2022 will be coming to a close soon, and with it, we’ll close the book on a historic session of Congress. We are incredibly proud of what our campaign achieved, but we also have to look to the future.
**With an inbound Republican majority, Pramila’s leadership of our progressive bloc will be more important than ever.**
[**Will you stand with Pramila and send a donation of $3 or more so she can maintain her momentum entering the next session of Congress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25387?refcode=em20221221-1977&t=1&akid=1977%2E420207%2Eg1ci8Q)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25387?refcode=em20221221-1977&t=20&akid=1977%2E420207%2Eg1ci8Q)**
Thanks to your support, in 2022, we raised **millions of dollars** , called tens of thousands of voters, knocked on **thousands of doors,** helped send a**slate of new progressives** to Congress, and ensured Pramila could help pass **transformative legislation** in Congress.
We do not take these achievements lightly, and we know that everything was made possible by your support. We’re a grassroots movement — we will never accept a cent of corporate PAC money or bend to special interests.
For that reason, we rely on your donations to keep Pramila strong, and that only grows more important every day that we get closer to a GOP-controlled House.
[**Peter, will you show your support for Pramila and donate $3, or whatever you can, before 2022 comes to a close?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25387?refcode=em20221221-1977&t=21&akid=1977%2E420207%2Eg1ci8Q)
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221221-1977-footer&t=22&refcode2=1977_420207_g1ci8Q&akid=1977%2E420207%2Eg1ci8Q)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1977%2E420207%2Eg1ci8Q)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1977%2E420207%2Eg1ci8Q)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Trump’s presidency. We need 500 responses by 9:00 AM tomorrow morning to reach statistical significance and PROVE Americans DON'T WANT another Trump Presidency. Please respond ASAP.]() | | | | | Thanks for your response, Team Ruiz Polling Division | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c18e9187dc348989d92d956dc7653d9&_e=a2lPbXYmfjdDosVujEP6bhytr-iFMJA0kxhnhoZ4g-iXFxqqKY2mcGzQ-AWp4EzTWuSgESddqwhooHvQg3LN7DpIxaK5qw6BvXYnhIcuew2kEWA_KMzNgiulc1PUXLss8tEEbruzwqgdiL6NQDAnujKfyIPyyO-91DwSwrga65fZvYbrmFQyZpXqxSDtCTI2rk73kBF4c4DTBXNslfuXSeV7U-3yqFDR6U5G7_76b5NjF57sX3pSsC3ISWNw6FWqsZawXQFQcLHgQYJOYqWZcSmB9BmyS2Xe1RnJitRTblTgS-hkbd51uEWyksiN-QU62SGgqSv6Zrv6TDmO0Cc2e4QV7ZYIn1oNlnL7Oh0lvw2r4qqe_uNrpnvyqoWGzoXCIYTvJawEZ19u8LN-dXh69LMzF7K5Ex0LuAZbGbxvDGtgry6DVegOW6ZyM4KtteGOCcWc_npRrHe29JqBaew0Uw%3D%3D)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c18e9187dc348989d92d956dc7653d9&_e=KwQuY2T5DvNkaxOHkVzjLfD7ngorShd1vl7ykoetQqcocz2X-YdhGQEjJZU1qXUhv-NBctLRgDQU7FD3FumBYPDqd1I4T07UwCsHzdBaF0rY8BCZr5pWEbe2d8F0GgMQUbzD6BPRF8U9VI39RpbzlYZQgv2bvOufQU2-u00Yd3ZwqAQPw7Or33g8wF11z550k6dSzCmEbJY81q8VQtrnE5KsQKSZBrBrb8su8ZO5uagynBbDPzvvuftuRJXLA54_wXCKqxQBTDrOpBgpfkeMuLYoFUFzc7xKgivSz_cMuij6j_3M5NMNE9bU4ZzRjvE3p4VfpMx7oBplWqzPX_qHe_wD45xS6Zi_f9kzwsYBs2l06SbOYXtTiML5ST_vwOHLTrxWzuICQo5Xt5ZKPhRxrLFnOcIYYT52Pn-W5nD921dLtKXct9rMwMOFDE3wrCSeOsAnFmAc2U-AajlT7vJPxjg_rgeytdmsGc7hTTRcofs%3D) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c18e9187dc348989d92d956dc7653d9&_e=KwQuY2T5DvNkaxOHkVzjLfD7ngorShd1vl7ykoetQqcocz2X-YdhGQEjJZU1qXUhv-NBctLRgDQU7FD3FumBYPDqd1I4T07UwCsHzdBaF0rY8BCZr5pWEbe2d8F0GgMQUbzD6BPRF8U9VI39RpbzlYZQgv2bvOufQU2-u00Yd3ZwqAQPw7Or33g8wF11z550k6dSzCmEbJY81q8VQtrnE5KsQKSZBrBrb8su8ZO5uagynBbDPzvvuftuRJXLA54_wXCKqxQBTDrOpBgpfkeMuLYoFUFzc7xKgivSz_cMuij6j_3M5NMNE9bU4ZzRjvE3q299IA80k3ONsbvRqjqrhMkqFcbP_jcSjIIPKBerJmkR21RNjgV9rJ-d9A6DQYStrbu0ZLug8pxPh_uldvFO4hPdqzZVsfmDtQ4KzFR37H2REEKFZ1u4NOvgU-xdPnU7h7-twvscsTMrLA3-TCIBR-vy6hW5U0OlaxoYPF2Fw2M%3D) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c18e9187dc348989d92d956dc7653d9&_e=KwQuY2T5DvNkaxOHkVzjLfD7ngorShd1vl7ykoetQqcocz2X-YdhGQEjJZU1qXUhv-NBctLRgDQU7FD3FumBYPDqd1I4T07UwCsHzdBaF0rY8BCZr5pWEbe2d8F0GgMQUbzD6BPRF8U9VI39RpbzlYZQgv2bvOufQU2-u00Yd3ZwqAQPw7Or33g8wF11z550k6dSzCmEbJY81q8VQtrnE5KsQKSZBrBrb8su8ZO5uagynBbDPzvvuftuRJXLA54_wXCKqxQBTDrOpBgpfkeMuLYoFUFzc7xKgivSz_cMuij6j_3M5NMNE9bU4ZzRjvE3zL_GsjKShB1heqhxe0cf3S_obSDwXLv_XtwEqTJb994qa4PhP2RggajZpP4Jzfnxls29yuySQAr2G6X-AAoOBXDQDC1r_vL8Iq1MjLUaoGohWNT--top3Ti006-J20v2u3RJyDu233JEQV1kgTTF6VUuZV_ok_CT2w5zpsLTUJQ%3D)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

body:
https://www.kpef.info [https://www.kpef.info]

Dear Friend,

We are so grateful for all of the support and encouragement you've given us in 2022. Because we worked together last year, the progressive movement in Pennsylvania had some big wins. And because we continue to join in our efforts, our strength and community is growing and evolving.

We hope that you can take some time this holiday season for yourselves, to recharge for the work we'll be doing next year. You power our movement.

>From all of us at Keystone Progress, we wish you a joyful holiday season and happy New Year!

In thanks and solidarity,

]Laura

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

name: Team AOC
subject: Watch: Special video from Alexandria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria recaps the past year.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221221-3727-header&t=1&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)
Over the last year, we’ve made some incredible progress — as a team and as a movement — and **Alexandria took a look back to celebrate some of those victories with an end-of-year video recap**.
This video has become a bit of an annual tradition here at Team AOC.
So — for the third year in a row — **let’s count off 22 wins from 2022**!
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221221._wzqqq&refcode=em20221221-3727-P_FND_VID_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)**[Watch the video »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221221._wzqqq&refcode=em20221221-3727-P_FND_VID_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)**
**#1** \- This year, Alexandria introduced 33 pieces of legislation: 17 passed the House and **8 of Alexandria’s amendments and bills were signed into law**. Among these 8 new laws, Alexandria is especially proud of a new law that will offer support to developing nations seeking debt relief.
**#2** \- Because of Alexandria’s work on the Oversight Committee, this year the [**New York Attorney General filed a $250 million civil lawsuit against the Trump Organization**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15670?t=4&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79).
**#3** \- Our 4-year efforts on the Green New Deal **helped push Congress this year to make the largest ever investment in fighting climate change** – $369 billion! – with the Inflation Reduction Act. This funding is expected to **create 9 million new jobs in renewable energy and lower annual energy bills by an average of $1,000/year**.
**#4** \- Speaking of the GND, **we launched our first Green New Deal Projects**! Working with other House Members, [**we secured $100 million dollars for more than sixty projects, stretching from Hawaii to Vermont**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=5&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79). (In NY-14, Alexandria secured funding for a GND program at SUNY Maritime that trained nearly 300 students for good paying, union jobs in wind energy).
**#5** - Alexandria worked with Rep. Grace Meng to [**secure $120 million for water infrastructure in Queens**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15671?t=6&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79). This long overdue investment will address the sewage failures that led to deadly flash floods during Hurricane Ida.
**#6** \- Alexandria **secured $7 million for 10 major community projects around The Bronx and Queens** , including a new labor unit and delivery unit to improve care for mothers and babies at Elmhurst Hospital, a public hospital in Queens.
**#7** \- Alexandria [**secured $2 million to establish the first multi-service community center serving South Asian & Indo-Caribbean communities in NYC**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15672?t=7&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)**.** Organized by Chhaya CDC, this new space in Jackson Heights will provide housing assistance, immigration help, and many more much-needed services.
**#8** \- Alexandria invested in local community violence reduction programs, including **a $400,000 grant to Jacobi’s Stand Up to Violence Program - which has a proven record of reducing recurrence of violence among participants by 50 percent**.
**#9** \- We showed up for our community. We hosted or participated in **150 community outreach** events, including 9 town halls, distributed over 1,000 backpacks, and organized a summer literacy program in Queens.
**#10** \- Alexandria’s constituent services team **helped NY-14 residents get back over $1.9 million that they were owed from federal agencies.** In total, they opened over 1,800 cases, and met with over 800 walk-ins.
**#11** \- Alexandria assisted community organizations with letters of support and technical grant applications, and helped deliver federal funding through the Clean School Bus Program for [**a new fleet of electric school buses in NYC!**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15673?t=8&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)
**#12** \- After years of work with our NYC taxi drivers, **we won the fight to bail out taxi drivers** who fell victim to predatory medallion loans with $315 million in debt relief.
**#13** \- Team AOC took our **Homework Helpers** volunteer tutoring program statewide with a chapter at the University of Buffalo, and **provided 3,800 sessions in 2022!**
**#14** \- With your support, Alexandria and Team AOC fundraised $6.3 million for charity and mutual aid, and $830K for grassroots organizations.**That includes over $400K for abortion rights groups** working in Texas, Kansas, and other highly restrictive states.
**#15** \- Our [**Courage to Change PAC**](http://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15674?t=9&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79) **helped to elect 35 new progressive officials.**
**#16** \- We traveled to four states and**raised $1.3 million for progressive candidates** **and organizations** , resulting in the best midterm election for Democrats in 60 years!
**#17** \- Team AOC **took on disinformation in the Spanish-language community**. In addition to deep canvassing in Spanish-language programs, we launched **[_Wasapea con AOC_](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15675?t=10&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)** – **becoming one of the first campaigns in the country to have an organized presence on Whatsapp**.
**#18** \- After a wild year of NY redistricting, **Alexandria won her own reelection in NY-14 with 70% of the vote** and ran one of the most comprehensive field programs in NYC.
**#19** \- In the House, alongside Rep. Nydia Velazquez and others, **Alexandria helped lead negotiations and passage of the Puerto Rico Status Act** , which acknowledges the U.S. as a colonizing force for the first time in history and outlines a process for Boricuas to determine their own future.
**#20** \- Alexandria **helped to pass the first major gun reform in 30 years**. This new law will close dangerous loopholes, increase background checks, and crack down on interstate gun trafficking.
**#21** \- We also helped **cap insulin at $35 per month** for those on Medicare, starting next month. And we gave Medicare the power to negotiate the cost of other select prescription drugs.
**#22** \- Finally, **we made real progress in taxing the rich** , with a new 15% minimum tax rate on the largest corporations.
**And that isn’t even all of it!**
Most importantly: **the only reason Alexandria and Team AOC are able to do this work is because of you**.
Thanks to your involvement, millions of people have been positively impacted by phone banking, small dollar donations, sharing of information, and your support for our organizing.
**We do this work because we know, deep in our hearts, that a better world is possible – but the only way to win it, is together.**
If you want to see Alexandria’s recap videos from past years, check out our [**YouTube page**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15676?t=11&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79).
Thank you again, and here’s to next year!
In solidarity,
Team AOC
[Watch the video »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221221._wzqqq&refcode=em20221221-3727-P_FND_VID_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221221?refcode=em20221221-3727-P_FND_VID_GFM&t=13&refcode2=3727_2526796_5YXk79&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221221-3727-P_FND_VID_GFM&t=14&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=15&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=16&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=17&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=18&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=3727%2E2526796%2E5YXk79)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: 📎1/6 Committee Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=1&v=66)
---
Friend -- It's hard to believe our work on the January 6th Committee has come to an end. What began as a monumental quest for the truth has been distilled into a monumental report that is now committed to history. On election night 2020, when my victory was called, I never imagined the sitting President of the United States would refuse to concede and spread lies to incite his supporters to attack the U.S. Capitol on one of our republic's darkest days. His lies called me to stand for truth; his lies called me to vote for impeachment, despite knowing it could cost me my job; his lies called me to accept an appointment to serve on the January 6th Committee, despite the violent threats to my family; and his lies called us all to the Country First Movement. Donald Trump may have brought out the worst in a lot of people; but his threat to democracy brought out the best in a lot of us, too. [>> I am incredibly grateful for your moral support of this movement. If a year-end gift is not too much to ask, would you consider giving us a great head start toward 2023's success?](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=2&v=66) Had I known that standing up for the truth would mean sacrificing my job, friendships, and even my personal security, I would -- without hesitation -- do it all over again. I can rest easy at night knowing I fulfilled my oath of office; that our committee's work may help prevent this from happening again; and that the impact of Country First has just begun.

I have sworn an oath, both in uniform and in office, to protect this nation and its constitution. And I carry that oath forward as our movement continues to grow every day. And if the past is any predictor of the future – the sky is the limit for what Country First can accomplish. In 2022, our Primary First operation succeeded in defending some good guys, and taking out some bad guys. Our General Election operation was even more successful, and focused on supporting Secretary of State candidates in 2024 battleground states. With your help, Country First won each of our targeted Governor and Secretary of State races, making it harder for Donald Trump – or anyone else – to steal the election in 2024. | [](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=3&v=66 "Support our Critical Mission") [Support our Critical Mission](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=3&v=66)
---
As we move forward to 2023, I’m excited for all Country First has in the pipeline. We will continue to defend democracy and go after those who threaten it. Step by step -- even the occasional step backward -- we are heading for victory!
It's an honor to have you alongside me. Thank you for believing our democracy is worth it.
Country First,
Adam
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Digest
Country First presents the final edition of _The Digest_ to highlight the important work of the 1/6 Committee. We would like to give our deepest thanks to the team of volunteers who've spent many hours and late nights helping to compile these digests for the benefit of our movement over the past year, including: Emily H.; Mikayla T.; Amy D.T.; Bob G.; Max F.; Arthur H.; Nathan D.; and James C. **COMING SOON: **
* The 1/6 Committee is due to release its complete final report on Thursday, December 22nd.

* * *
Here are the major developments from the committee's final meeting: **1/6 Committee Refers Ex-President the DOJ on Four Counts** On Monday, the 1/6 Committee completed its year-long investigation of Trump's attempted coup by criminally referring the former president to the Department of Justice. Rep. Kinzinger has previously [discussed](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=Y5Xlf9pA_AJcYmYaz2zF4KLSL_Z-ON-XRNdWEjldRB00R7cVZQxhr1Upozlfhu_bv8kGm_78Rd5UjBMHjat4x8fzn_ueUMh1PBf9x3Mg-uE&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=4&v=66) criminal referrals, calling them "more than symbolic" and a "signal that Congress thinks a crime has been committed and the DOJ should investigate it." In a somber moment, the 1/6 Committee laid out its referrals to the Department of Justice. Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-MD), [described](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZ0mv8lDl7zj35GghDujYQz&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=5&v=66) each crime the committee believes Donald Trump and others committed. The four counts are as follows: Obstruction of an Official Proceeding (18 U.S.C § 1512(c)); Conspiracy to Defraud the United States (18 U.S.C § 371); Conspiracy to Make a False Statement (18 U.S.C §§ 371,1001); and "Incite," "Assist," or "Aid or Comfort" an insurrection (18 U.S.C § 2383). **Ex-President Criminally Referred. What Does Each Count Mean?** The 1/6 Committee’s investigation of the attack on the U.S. Capitol concluded in dramatic fashion on Monday with the decision to criminally refer the former president to the Department of Justice on four statutes. While Congress has the authority to refer anyone for prosecution, they do not hold the power to prosecute. Each count carries a [different sentence](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=z5xCBPrSpxBGqHHfuTkZiFknPQXrqqtLhb4M9VfUNgSgZsTDvJhnk9L4CvXnUqJEXNQtVn2Kh08PTIVFWrB_NYK7LG89w1OSsOWlVBmuj70XJfdwPCZZOt6IGXnFlcsV57ImY8YuA0nO4wg5hm5tG9A4FMPFuXRhYK7rmqksiqNzAu6zRTmSliXhqzJuo-gB&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=6&v=66) and is for a different moment in which Trump and his allies attempted to subvert the will of the American people.
* **Obstruction of an Official Proceeding** (18 U.S.C § 1512(c))
* "...corruptly...obstructs, influences, or impedes any official proceeding, or attempts to do so..."
* This charge carries a maximum sentence of 20 years in a federal prison.
* Rep. Raskin [concluded](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZ0mv8lDl7zj35GghDujYQz&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=7&v=66), "The whole purpose and obvious effect of Trump’s scheme were to obstruct, influence, and impede this official proceeding: the central moment for the lawful transfer of power in the United States [the Joint Session of Congress to count the electoral votes].”
* **Conspiracy to Defraud the United States** (18 U.S.C § 371)
* "...conspire either to commit any offense against the United States, or to defraud the United States..."
* This charge carries a maximum sentence of 10 years in a federal prison.
* Raskin [explained](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZ0mv8lDl7zj35GghDujYQz&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=8&v=66), "In other words, to make an agreement to impair, obstruct, or defeat the lawful functions of the United States Government by deceitful or dishonest means."
* He also said that Trump was not the only person who engaged in this behavior, he worked with others. "He entered into agreements," Raskin pointed out.
* **Conspiracy to Make a False Statement** (18 U.S.C §§ 371,1001)
* "...in any matter within the jurisdiction of the...Government of the United States... makes any materially false, fictitious, or fraudulent statement.."
* This charge carries a maximum sentence of 5 years in a federal prison.
* Raskin [said](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZ0mv8lDl7zj35GghDujYQz&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=9&v=66) that the evidence shows Trump violated this statute by submitting to the National Archives and to Congress "slates of fake electors."
* "We believe that this evidence we set forth in our report is more than sufficient for a criminal referral," he concluded.

* **"Incite," "Assist," or "Aid or Comfort" an Insurrection** (18 U.S.C § 2383)
* "...incites,... assists, or engages in any rebellion or insurrection... or gives aid or comfort thereto..."
* This charge carries a maximum sentence of 10 years in a federal prison and prohibits the perpetrator from holding public office in the United States.
* "More evidence than needed shows that Donald Trump 'assisted,' 'aided,' and 'gave comfort' to the insurrectionists who attacked the Capitol on January 6th," said Raskin. "The committee has developed significant evidence that President Trump intended to disrupt the peaceful transition of power under our Constitution."

"We understand the gravity of each and every referral we are making today, just as we understand the magnitude of the crime against democracy," Rep. Raskin said in his conclusion. "But we have gone where the facts and the law lead us and, inescapably, they lead us here." **Members of Congress Referred to the House Ethics Committee** The 1/6 Committee also [referred members of congress](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2PcjmkijSlrcPzIc5hTE0mvj69l1qgfYNk60kjIvjDDpDjV69xlTKML-7pS-V1HWBm3fA0YiDwr_umsMSeWdWG1M0pe4UGEzEqMPyOxdocWSvi1zp_hg_hJGHANq3upJddM8BQkL5Xqsbds0TNAjlMWHPubclITgoKsZrMV_y0u1YG&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=10&v=66) to the House Ethics Committee. Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA), Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ), Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA), and Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) did not comply with the committee’s subpoenas. While these referrals to the House Ethics Committee are unlikely to move forward (they are sure be blocked by some members of the Ethics Committee), the 1/6 Committee believes it is still necessary to show the American people that Congress is not above the law. Biggs and Jordan immediately responded to the referrals, calling them a "sham" and a "political stunt," despite, as a matter of fact, neither of them complying with a congressional [subpoena](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHdBCuyNJiKz5BEdz-CPBHuNrvukTLzLdSQdyABdHwYB4q7FkaQQnh8faRWaKQsWzGQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=11&v=66). **Congressman Kinzinger’s Remarks During Final Hearing Focused on the DOJ and Election Fraud Claims** Congressman Adam Kinzinger in his [opening remarks](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRaGN93Yz5s_qN_-n1_UadgU&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=j6report_digest_nd&n=12&v=66) summarized the effort by President Trump to corrupt the Justice Department. "It’s of the utmost importance that our Department of Justice operates a fair and neutral body that enforces our federal laws without fear or favor," Kinzinger explained. Although Attorney General Bill Barr had repeatedly told President Trump that there was no evidence of fraud sufficient to overturn the election, Trump continued to spread these false narratives to the public. After Attorney General Barr resigned, Trump then pressured the new acting Attorney General, Jeffery Rosen, and the acting Deputy Attorney General, Richard Donoghue, to "just say the election was corrupt." Trump was again told that there was no evidence to support his claims. As a result, he attempted to install Jeffery Clark as acting Attorney General, who had promised to "take the actions that Barr, Rosen, and Donoghue had refused to take." Trump reversed course on elevating Clark after White House and DOJ officials threatened to resign en masse.
* * *
_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- It's hard to believe our work on the January 6th Committee has come to an end. What began as a monumental quest for the truth has been distilled into a monumental report that is now committed to history. On election night 2020, when my victory was called, I never imagined the sitting President of the United States would refuse to concede and spread lies to incite his supporters to attack the U.S. Capitol on one of our republic's darkest days. His lies called me to stand for truth; his lies called me to vote for impeachment, despite knowing it could cost me my job; his lies called me to accept an appointment to serve on the January 6th Committee, despite the violent threats to my family; and his lies called us all to the Country First Movement. Donald Trump may have brought out the worst in a lot of people; but his threat to democracy brought out the best in a lot of us, too. Had I known that standing up for the truth would mean sacrificing my job, friendships, and even my personal security, I would -- without hesitation -- do it all over again. I can rest easy at night knowing I fulfilled my oath of office; that our committee's work may help prevent this from happening again; and that the impact of Country First has just begun. I have sworn an oath, both in uniform and in office, to protect this nation and its constitution. And I carry that oath forward as our movement continues to grow every day. And if the past is any predictor of the future – the sky is the limit for what Country First can accomplish. In 2022, our Primary First operation succeeded in defending some good guys, and taking out some bad guys. Our General Election operation was even more successful, and focused on supporting Secretary of State candidates in 2024 battleground states. With your help, Country First won each of our targeted Governor and Secretary of State races, making it harder for Donald Trump – or anyone else – to steal the election in 2024. | "Support our Critical Mission" As we move forward to 2023, I’m excited for all Country First has in the pipeline. We will continue to defend democracy and go after those who threaten it. Step by step -- even the occasional step backward -- we are heading for victory! It's an honor to have you alongside me. Thank you for believing our democracy is worth it. We would like to give our deepest thanks to the team of volunteers who've spent many hours and late nights helping to compile these digests for the benefit of our movement over the past year, including: Emily H.; Mikayla T.; Amy D.T.; Bob G.; Max F.; Arthur H.; Nathan D.; and James C. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---

| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8af239d2cb644c8b4c8af0258d0a597&_e=G-3jGUKPd7GtkxZYFv1kBicU3TLMQXV-oZreUcLyozcPIENwaurhA0mZq9F4k85Et0rM20H6Z0utqGubvIe-ap5stYJUf1pWM-Tp_tXrAPHhpsDzZlQtu4FNUnoqSEpLy3HmOy3QNi1m6E-9cvXC-JPOS4fG03eo36uISpgAflr6OLkpeCOcqlfuWu-XAPyOD1swn3n56ZzaNbhRtwlloZjc1nabJalzAi1VICQ-8LgSAuHK7_V3u2r_PsIK1alcnkLt_28K20Op-q2MN6Bm1C6Lq7CrJxsvD1edc0UC84Syq837QIFOtu-j-aZTG4exocoPBw-Tk5HzQ3VoGKtIxC6NURts96-G6FqwI3CvxNSiPTMQ5A8CaFTW6UIcJppL) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8af239d2cb644c8b4c8af0258d0a597&_e=G-3jGUKPd7GtkxZYFv1kBicU3TLMQXV-oZreUcLyozcPIENwaurhA0mZq9F4k85Et0rM20H6Z0utqGubvIe-ap5stYJUf1pWM-Tp_tXrAPHhpsDzZlQtu4FNUnoqSEpLy3HmOy3QNi1m6E-9cvXC-JPOS4fG03eo36uISpgAflr6OLkpeCOcqlfuWu-XAPyOD1swn3n56ZzaNbhRtwlloZjc1nabJalzAi1VICQ-8LimmzsoKmzBif8Oq4iK18liIGSiRXH1ectBN9y6pRssHRx1M83fzTN3bs0EHkvxNOMkY9UXKxzl_hBL25xKy9doilsXuPDpI0nPZSjty1xmLlPDugKj7JI5QFTihmrOzPDhp3ISEFu4hhCNIHbulddu) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8af239d2cb644c8b4c8af0258d0a597&_e=G-3jGUKPd7GtkxZYFv1kBicU3TLMQXV-oZreUcLyozcPIENwaurhA0mZq9F4k85Et0rM20H6Z0utqGubvIe-ap5stYJUf1pWM-Tp_tXrAPHhpsDzZlQtu4FNUnoqSEpLy3HmOy3QNi1m6E-9cvXC-JPOS4fG03eo36uISpgAflr6OLkpeCOcqlfuWu-XAPyOD1swn3n56ZzaNbhRtwlloZjc1nabJalzAi1VICQ-8LhhnjCyWOrubl9EAdWwddUGedzCwWNcTTkFLd3rvWYEJC0c8xG91yunM7tlwfQW6FIvdIsA1p3wDTVUw0la7YtTZBuC3yeHMjI3zklU6wBeKM1ey2isVq_g8GvspgN1OM3KWlEzAj66s0ObNpAOU6eb)

| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8af239d2cb644c8b4c8af0258d0a597&_e=G-3jGUKPd7GtkxZYFv1kBicU3TLMQXV-oZreUcLyozcPIENwaurhA0mZq9F4k85Et0rM20H6Z0utqGubvIe-ap5stYJUf1pWM-Tp_tXrAPHhpsDzZlQtu4FNUnoqSEpLy3HmOy3QNi1m6E-9cvXC-JPOS4fG03eo36uISpgAflr6OLkpeCOcqlfuWu-XAPyOD1swn3n56ZzaNbhRtwlloZjc1nabJalzAi1VICQ-8LjFCWxN8LO6IA6Lp_2658MAtz4VPFICMu2q9oBZVTh784qcAZ5PVmfHVI_6D_4NlHf515-cey2Fc804lbjd9RTntuLH0-tTdkRG8T3MaO6xXfWRq6O6HGsW11sQaz8wptIyhwZA5tYYt2nSMUWc84a1) Sincerely,

| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8af239d2cb644c8b4c8af0258d0a597&_e=G-3jGUKPd7GtkxZYFv1kBicU3TLMQXV-oZreUcLyozcPIENwaurhA0mZq9F4k85Et0rM20H6Z0utqGubvIe-ap5stYJUf1pWM-Tp_tXrAPHhpsDzZlQtu4FNUnoqSEpLy3HmOy3QNi1m6E-9cvXC-JPOS4fG03eo36uISpgAflr6OLkpeCOcqlfuWu-XAPyOD1swn3n56ZzaNbhRtwlloZjc1nabJalzAi1VICQ-8LgSoWpHpOzIG54s8uYz30P9amNVZiZtMsJWGHskEN6VCkUJFsMILAMXeXYy-xLpXVF0S3cnlAxopZwDWgdEWBfc1XA2b30wc2mdKFU_v1eXFOJqeFk9wU6XMlDmvWkYqOOTEadmBzah_7glrybG1SV2)
