clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria." | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?" This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: James C. Roberts, American Veterans Center
subject: Will you sign this Christmas Card for our heroic veterans?
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZzwS8_qOhVZV_UynAgtyI-yFtPEZfEXEO_W7mGmN_QsYLIw7lMofxKE7S4X0BmSWbYOldDZF0f2LT36QhdR7ilc0BP_qEAEA_fxA-6zfpxF_yBgjgDRzTL-3oaBDet6GOCNAaSZRuVRI9KtDZKXiBal)

Friend, This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nation. The American Veterans Center does more than _any other organization_ to tell the stories and preserve the legacies of America's heroes. It's been our honor to be trusted by work with thousands of veterans, from World War II to Iraq and Afghanistan. [**We've set a goal of 50,000 signatures for this special card by Christmas Eve, December 24th. Will you add your name now it?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZxMcw_LEh7iWZT86FHKJNkbkszdGD99ERtNMZvX9Yg4uMImvozM5S84bhSEYwrYicUAWJMnKkOCNKJwlZ_xUYoGVdApmVIZtBDuMAcMo0dQZqsHMs9MgwkkBrSejpGfjEtDMk7oP1VM7QvcZ0DtmX_T)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZwrhaM1bY0oAgO-aHRQDwpv5aZCN0Kgbl61mDc2qFO_g84EIZJwX4hLS4ST6jCDvZWwhDwD35k_WkRJ1uYC7Edq7Z0ijsRIMhfJoXbEkRgaQsngSebM8VhQNYudn_yErDZ1dZMhY38oxntTqkPMqXq-)
---
This holiday season, just like every year, it's vitally important to show our heroic veterans the support the deserve. **By reaching our goal of 50,000 signatures, we're sending a message of support to let all those who have served know that patriotic Americans will forever remain thankful for their sacrifice for our nation.** _And we 'll share the Christmas card signatures and personal notes of support with veterans from World War II through to today._ As thousands of the courageous men and women who served in World War II, Korea, Vietnam and beyond leave us each day, it is our duty to let those who have served know that we have not _and will not_ forget their sacrifice. [**Friend, will you please add your name to this special Christmas card to let our heroic veterans know that they are remembered this holiday season?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZynTG6wlBE37RqI2LkpWsjFyT8gAzCRWottP1p46_45q7gVL0dyx3wNdP-YGcG4hZDZrwW86eCFDTJUV5nIfy19acP8G6ogaEnIFluxvwiOt2hBcps-R9_9qSOzRB6ievDhl5ntKwb0vY1iG3vZWPkL)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZzXLfvGsZG10lFirDTzK2y848tuegHAAtWpHS_Kx4XA0SJFv3XjcWrob_dmsby70vTPliC2Ov5FLmpPn7sfEkmApXOUOX068CAVIQV0AksU2Yaw6hzXmCoRIPoycu7v_KyJKExQ_t_7B0fZHlKn5vog)
---
As we prepare to celebrate the joy of Christmas, we ask that you join us in supporting American veterans, by sending them a special and meaningful Christmas greeting from their fellow Americans. According to the U.S. Census Bureau's most recent study, there are currently about 16.5 million veterans in the United States. The majority of them served during the Vietnam War era and are over the age of 75. Those brave men and women put their lives on the line to preserve our freedom at home, and now it's up to us to show them that we remember and appreciate their service and sacrifice -- especially in this holiday season. [**I hope you 'll take just a moment to do that right now by signing AVC's Christmas Card.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZySsvvQx76IHieR12x62-82rETxVb5qfI7Rb8joVZPtEyjKVqT3gaP7XoGd1IgeKnrOKBq8dpzfc_9TXozm2gVuEAAy4DNy8Sep7WMHRvELa5na9P479mW70wYoRLRoKPjw1reXhsbMiJ5RJWuZFDZo)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZxJWoqLGnKU8gXi8O-CpT0ksGOMVgb3LbqlKrRuoGCV2QgXjqG_OYcUHYCx6q-75nmHzxl52QvLwNnZRSdajbzObu7CT0QHqaMMAEk4YivzHcNzCrihjQYxuI6E6QLlxvoVPFkIKCDgAhmnfL4gxR8P)
---
Thank you, Merry Christmas, and God bless our heroic veterans!
---
James Roberts Chairman & Founder American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f4b9f329e64998a50eb833e3c16676&_e=oHQCA7iOwthBsW1_EPEBlfP4ezrOzSOlYyV_GuTENsNt90skbeQABdmL5CEX8kBLMgjOkJEFY39HVv9XOxjibi0HTcJEpMmjgcmHwS_WXhNRIiFJB6Vb8yAN6gEaHYzsdE_XX2L63K4a2vhR8jcJcdw-fEMyJST95ubpHA6X2ZzUVvnLxYfE4VDmDLqmUcqduEGw9VCXht9inFAqCxSiZtBnCZVBAhoAEuyxi9a981N8J_YLGRmI2dFQRvZeHH_BYDUP-KGCmkicMCC2XWpPZc94qBrpE3jHksHjfvwVtyKMxqBRmE698sTghsGpLIFM)

Peter, The 2024 Indiana political landscape is coming into clear view. We’re seeing the national trends of the Republican Party happening right here in Indiana: Republicans are divided and fighting amongst themselves. As extreme Republicans like Mike Braun jockey for position, **Democrats have an opportunity to capitalize on their arrogance and extremism.** We know that the key to success in politics is a long-term commitment to organizing at the local level. That’s why we’re committed to investing in municipal elections in 2023, flipping as many mayoral seats as we can, and setting ourselves up for success in 2024. clean_body: WATCH INSIDE | THIS IS URGENT. I just released a NEW video that unveils my plan to reclaim and preserve free speech for all Americans. WATCH INSIDE | THIS IS URGENT. I just released a NEW video that unveils my plan to reclaim and preserve free speech for all Americans. Friend, THIS IS URGENT. I just released a NEW video that unveils my plan to reclaim and preserve free speech for all Americans. Once I am inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States, I will sign an executive order banning any federal department or agency from colluding with any organization, business, or person to censor, limit, categorize, or impede the lawful speech of American citizens. I will then ban federal money from being used to label domestic speech as ‘mis-‘ or ‘dis-information.' And I will begin the process of identifying and firing every federal bureaucrat who has engaged in domestic censorship — directly or indirectly — whether they are the Department of Homeland Security, the Department of Health and Human Services, the FBI, or the DOJ, no matter who they are. I promise to ALWAYS do whatever it takes to PROTECT YOUR FREEDOM OF SPEECH, Friend. Unlike the Democrats, who only want to SILENCE YOU. With your help, we will WIN in 2024 and take back the White House. I urgently need YOU to stop whatever you're doing and watch my video. HURRY. My team will send me a list of Patriots who took action and watched my video. Will YOUR name be on it? Thank you, Donald J. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: The extremists have doubled down
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=121622 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=121622] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friend,
History will remember 2022 as the year that election deniers faced crushing defeats at the ballot box. But the path forward from here is in no way predetermined.
Whether it’s elected officials in Congress or state legislatures across the country, far-right political extremism is still running rampant across the country. Despite the loud, pro-democracy victories we saw in November, they’re doubling down on their attempt to upend democratic order.
At the U.S. Supreme Court, the North Carolina State Legislature argued for the “Independent State Legislature Theory.” If they get their way, state legislatures will be free to violate their own state constitutions and issue partisan election rules that will upend democratic processes across the country. It could even leave the door open for attacks on Michigan’s independent redistricting commission.
In Congress, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene proclaimed that she would have “won” if she led the January 6th iInsurrection. Republican House leadership didn’t condemn her comments, and they continue to promote her as a national figure in their party. Their silence is just as telling as the comment itself.
In the weeks that have followed the midterms, election officials have continued to deal with harassment and threats of violence. It’s horrific that we’ve had to deal with such dangerous rhetoric for the simple act of doing their jobs. But I know we’re tougher and more determined than ever to continue defending our country.
As we move into 2023, I want to thank you, again, for standing on the right side of this country-wide fight for democracy. But remember, the extremists have doubled down. They will continue to be a visible and dangerous part of our politics. And we must, under any circumstances, defeat them.
Onward,
Jocelyn
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: Democracy Update | NDRC
subject: President Barack Obama on what we must do next:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
the 2022 midterms are over, but our work is not
|
---

Team, thanks to your support, our work at the NDRC made a _huge_ impact in the midterm elections. Together, we helped our Democracy Defenders: ✨ **Win eight** gubernatorial offices
✨ **Win three** secretary of state races
✨ **Flip four** state legislative chambers
✨ **Protect six** legislative chambers with Democratic majorities
✨ **_...and more!_** You should be incredibly proud of the work you did to make those victories a reality. **But as President Barack Obama made clear, our work to defend democracy _must_ continue:** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56261467/384402890/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221221.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNDUxZjM2LTgzODEtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qr-mVPh8VsdvfELaTVmNjx46XiO6cw_72ZodrqOHbTQ=)**
---
In this election, millions of people cast their ballots for an America that is more fair, more just, more equal, and more free.

**While we still have a lot of work to do as a nation, this keeps us moving forward.

Our democracy is resilient as long as we stay engaged and active between elections.**
[Stay engaged! name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Hackers Tied to China’s Govt. Steal $20 Mil in U.S. COVID Relief Funds
body:
Nearly a year after Judicial Watch launched an investigation into the
theft of U.S. COVID relief funds by foreign hackers, the Secret
Service confirms that cyber criminals connected to China’s
government stole $20 million in benefits.

[alt_text]

[*****]
December 21, 2022

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61519&L=28610&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGFja2Vycy1zdGVhbC0yMC1taWwtaW4tY292aWQtcmVsaWVmLWZ1bmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]

Nearly a year after Judicial Watch launched an investigation into
the theft of U.S. COVID relief funds by foreign hackers, the Secret
Service confirms that cyber criminals connected to China’s
government stole $20 million in benefits. This includes Small Business
Administration (SBA) loans and unemployment insurance money in
multiple states, according to a national news story that identifies
the perpetrators as a APT41, a hacking group based in Chengdu. The
report cites U.S. law enforcement officials and cybersecurity experts
who believe the multi-million-dollar theft of government pandemic
funds by the Chinese faction “may just be the tip of the iceberg.”

clean_body: Nearly a year after Judicial Watch launched an investigation into the theft of U.S. COVID relief funds by foreign hackers, the Secret Service confirms that cyber criminals connected to China’s government stole $20 million in benefits. [alt_text] [*****] December 21, 2022 [article-image] [==] Nearly a year after Judicial Watch launched an investigation into the theft of U.S. COVID relief funds by foreign hackers, the Secret Service confirms that cyber criminals connected to China’s government stole $20 million in benefits. This includes Small Business Administration (SBA) loans and unemployment insurance money in multiple states, according to a national news story that identifies the perpetrators as a APT41, a hacking group based in Chengdu. The report cites U.S. law enforcement officials and cybersecurity experts who believe the multi-million-dollar theft of government pandemic funds by the Chinese faction “may just be the tip of the iceberg.” Read More [==] [Removal of Criminal Illegal Immigrants Arrested by Local Police Drops 71% Under Biden] [] Removal of Criminal Illegal Immigrants Arrested by Local Police Drops 71% Under Biden [] Biden Admin to Drop Half a Million on Artificial Intelligence That Detects Microaggressions on Social Media [] Judicial Watch Sues Air Force Academy for Records on Critical Race Theory, ‘White Supremacy’ [] [Judicial Watch Victories: California Court of Appeal Upholds Court Injunctions against Quotas for Corporate Boards] [] Judicial Watch Victories: California Court of Appeal Upholds Court Injunctions against Quotas for Corporate Boards [] [FBI sued for suspending analyst, military vet for espousing ‘conspiratorial’ Jan. 6 views] [=] FBI sued for suspending analyst, military vet for espousing ‘conspiratorial’ Jan. 6 views [=] Elon Musk: ‘My pronouns are Prosecute/Fauci’ [] Rhode Island Father Stands Strong Against Radical Race and Gender Indoctrination In Public Schools [=] [advertisement] [=] Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: DONATE [] [Judicial Watch] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 ©2017-2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] | Unsubscribe []

| | With tremendous support from grassroots donors like you, we made major strides in the fight to protect and expand the freedom to vote this year. Voters across the country turned out early and made their voices heard in strong numbers — despite dangerous voter suppression bills like SB 202 here in Georgia. Thank you, thank you, thank you for your commitment in this fight. There’s one way to ensure that we can continue making progress and build strong voter power in the next election: By growing the number of voting rights champions (like you!) who commit to monthly contributions to Fair Fight Action. **If you’re not already convinced, we want to share six reasons why we need you to[ _start a monthly donation to Fair Fight Action today:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56262249/384405578/1128805799?recurring=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221221_f_recurring_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTljZjIzZC04ODgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9lmRXLA_2XoBoFHNvRWUAXIf8UmqPCKqcilqZ6MgVo=)** 1️⃣ By committing to a monthly donation now, you’re helping our team **lay the groundwork early to invest** in key voting rights fights across the country. 2️⃣ We need to ensure we have sustained, recurring donations to be ready to **respond to any voting rights challenge** that anti-voter extremists throw our way. 3️⃣ We’re still working to **mitigate the damage of harmful anti-voter legislation** — like Governor Kemp’s law SB 202 here in Georgia — that are designed to make voting more difficult. 4️⃣ Our work is centered on **educating and empowering** **young, Black, and brown voters** to make their voices heard — and this requires consistent organizing efforts year-round, not just when it’s time to vote. 5️⃣ Monthly donations allow us to **budget and plan into the future** to ensure we’re running effective programs and seizing every opportunity to protect the freedom to vote — again, not only during election cycles. 6️⃣ Your recurring donation today will send a powerful message about**the strength of our movement and the determination of our supporters** across the country. [_**So if you’re able, will you commit to a monthly contribution to Fair Fight Action right now to maximize your impact and help make sure we have the resources to strengthen our democracy in 2023, 2024, and beyond?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56262250/384405579/1128805799?recurring=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221221_f_recurring_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTljZjIzZC04ODgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9lmRXLA_2XoBoFHNvRWUAXIf8UmqPCKqcilqZ6MgVo=) | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56262251/384405580/1128805799?recurring=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221221_f_recurring_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTljZjIzZC04ODgxLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9lmRXLA_2XoBoFHNvRWUAXIf8UmqPCKqcilqZ6MgVo=)

The Fair Fight Action Team

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The DCCC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
important:

The DCCC has a new leader: Rep. DelBene. She is the former head of the
‘New Dems’ — a centrist and right-winged group:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123829?refcode=em20221221-26680&t=1001&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl ][IMG]
The DCCC recruits and backs corporate-backed candidates who will serve the
establishment in Congress and toe the Party line.

This isn’t surprising. That’s why we’re working to find and recruit
working-class community leaders who will fight for issues that match the
scale of the crises we face. The new head of the DCCC is a part of the
centrist ‘New Dems’ wing of the Party, which makes it even more important
that we have the resources to recruit our next slate of candidates to
fight back against corporate interests.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123829?refcode=em20221221-26680&t=1002&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl ]Will you contribute $3 right now to support our 2024
Candidate Recruitment? Every dollar will help us find more leaders like
AOC and Cori.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123829?refcode=em20221221-26680&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl ]Contribute $3

Remember, after 2018 when AOC shocked the establishment, the DCCC enacted
their ‘Blacklist’ policy to try and stop progressive campaigns from
primarying entrenched incumbents. The DCCC has actively tried to hurt our
movement for change.

The DCCC raises money from Wall Street and corporate PACs to recruit
corporate candidates and protect incumbents, while we rely on grassroots
contributions to help elect working-class candidates fighting for
progressive change.

We just launched our 2024 Candidate Recruitment and we need your
support, Peter,
to reach our fundraising goal and have the resources to continue to do our
work next week.

We can’t let the status quo win. Not with so much on the line in the fight
to pass Medicare for All, win a Green New Deal, and expand our coalition
in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123829?refcode=em20221221-26680&t=1022&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl ]Please, if you can afford it, chip in to help us reach our 2024
Candidate Recruitment fundraising goal.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221221-26680-footer&t=1025&refcode2=26680_1203867_rW0KYl&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=26680%2E1203867%2ErW0KYl

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]Please, if you can afford it, chip in to help us reach our 2024 Candidate Recruitment fundraising goal. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:
